programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Astrologer
programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Echo of Yesterday
programme.desc: The resurgence of neo-Nazism in Germany takes the IMF to Bavaria, where Marcus von Frank (Hans Gudegast) threatens to become a second Hitler.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Photographer
programme.desc: The imagination of the IMF is put to the test when a massive spy ring in the U.S. headed by fashion photographer, David Redding, threatens to cripple the country with a deadly pneumonic plague.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Spy
programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans, mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons, are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Game of Chess
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Emerald
programme.desc: The IMF is assigned to recover microfilm plans for manipulating international gold reserves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Condemned
programme.desc: Jim Phelps comes to the aid of a personal friend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Counterfeiter
programme.desc: Destroying a drug ring is the task of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Town
programme.desc: IMF leader Jim Phelps is marked for murder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killing
programme.desc: The IMF sets out to destroy a murder-for-hire organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Phoenix
programme.desc: The IMF foils the attempts of a once-powerful communist to regain power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trial By Fury
programme.desc: The IMF goes to the aid of a friendly South American government which has been overthrown by revolutionaries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Recovery
programme.desc: The IMF takes the task of recovering a secret fail-safe device.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mercenaries
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force, led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) enters Equatorial Africa to crush an army of mercenaries, led by a self-styled colonel, and to return plundered gold to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Heir Apparent
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as a 50-year-old blind princess, heiress to a Balkan kingdom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Diplomat
programme.desc: Guest star Fernando Lamas portrays a diplomat-playboy who romances another diplomat's wife, played by Lee Grant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Contender, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is assigned to knock out a boxing syndicate which fixes fights to create favorable odds for a bookmaking operation, in the first half of a two-part story.

programme.title: The Lunchbox
programme.desc: I Mumbais travle hverdag bringer en feil levert lunsj to meget forskjellige skjebner sammen. Den litt stillfarende enkemannen Saajan mottar ved en feil lunsjen som husmoren Ila har laget til sin mann. Det blir starten på et utrolig eventyr.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: En singel kvinne med fokus på karrieren i New York blir tvunget til å forholde seg til følgene av et mislykket forhold når ekskjæresten hennes hyrer inn hennes reklamebyrå.

programme.title: Odd Man Rush
programme.desc: Odd Man Rush er basert på Bill Keenans bestselgende, komiske selvbiografi af samme navn. Den amerikanske ishockeyspiller Bobby Sanders fra Harvard blir solgt til en div. 1. klubb i Sverige for en vaskemaskin.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer spiller Frankie, en servitrise som jobber på en kaffebar i New York. Etter en rekke vonde forhold er en ny mann det siste Frankie ser etter... helt til en kommer og ser etter henne.

programme.title: A Christmas Feast
programme.desc: Det er jul og familien Oliverio gjør seg klare til De Syv Fiskers Middag, en italiensk kulinarisk tradisjon som har sine røtter fra gamlelandet. Midt i forberedelsene undrer Tony, en ung mann med store drømmer, om han vil finne kjærligheten i julen.

programme.title: Peace, Love & Misunderstanding
programme.desc: ”Peace, Love & Misunderstanding” er et hjertevarmt portrett av en fargerik familie. Det som var ment bare å være en helgtur endrer seg raskt til å bli et sommereventyr fylt med romantikk, familiehemmeligheter, og det som trengs for å være lykkelig.

programme.title: A Nice Girl Like You
programme.desc: Etter at ekskjæresten anklager henne for å være snerpete skriver Lucy, en ellers blyg fiolinist, en temmelig vill to do-liste, som sender henne hodestups ut i en ferd innom selvoppdagelse, vennskap og ny kjærlighet.

programme.title: Candy
programme.desc: Candy (Abbie Cornish) blir fascinert og tiltrukket av poeten Dan (Heath Ledger), som også er heroinmisbruker. Sammen beveger de seg ut på gyngende grunn, bundet sammen av deres bunnløse forelskelse og glupende seksuelle appetitt.

programme.title: Who Gets The Dog
programme.desc: Når Olive og Clay møttes var det kjærlighet ved første blikk, de giftet seg, kjøpte seg hus og adopterte en nyfødt valp - Wesley. Nå er det 6 år siden, og de har bestemt seg for å skille lag, og begge ønsker å ta sin elskede Wesley med seg.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Unreasonable Doubt
programme.desc: Johnny Smith is called to serve on a jury and uses his powers to uncover the real facts in the case.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The House
programme.desc: Johnny Smith experiences disturbing visions in his home that lead him to discover the truth about his mother's death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nervous Man in a Four Dollar Room
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.
programme.sub-title: Nervous Man in a Four Dollar Room

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: It's a Good Life
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Masks
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: People Are Alike All Over
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mind and the Matter
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Perchance to Dream
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Sixteen-Millimeter Shrine
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Denton on Doomsday
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Once Upon a Time
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Two
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Dummy
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Time Enough at Last
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Five Characters in Search of an Exit
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.
programme.sub-title: Five Characters in Search of an Exit

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Elegy
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Come Wander with Me
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Where is Everybody?
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Broken Circle
programme.desc: Johnny (Anthony Michael Hall) fights to stop Rebecca (Sarah Wynter) from killing Greg Stillson (Sean Patrick Flanery), whom she believes is responsible for her sister's murder.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Collector
programme.desc: Johnny's (Anthony Michael Hall) visions of a young girl's abduction lead him on a life-and-death race to find the collector (Brian Markinson), a disturbed man who kidnaps and indoctrinates young women.

programme.title: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Et provokativt drama om en 32 år gammel mann som tar med seg hjem en 14 år gammel jente han møter på nettet, med overraskende konsekvenser.
A man writing a book about the paranormal travels to New York and stays in a hotel room that has been said to be responsible for the death of all the guests that come to stay.

programme.title: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: Fem collegevenner drar til skogen for å drikke, feste og tulle rundt en helg. Men mens de sitter rundt leirbålet den første kvelden, dukker en eremitt gjennomvåt av blod opp.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: US vs. UN vs. UK
programme.desc: Team Scorpion blir utpresset til å bryte seg inn i FN for å hjelpe til med attentatet på en truende våpenhandler. Dessuten gjør Sylvester et dristig trekk for å beskytte Megans ønsker.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Når teamet og Walters foreldre besøker Megan på sykehuset mens helsen hennes blir dårligere, blir de satt i karantene etter at et dødelig sopputbrudd truer med å infisere alle.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Team Scorpion går undercover på et universitet for å finne en hacker som infiltrerer Federal Reserve og truer med å kollapse verdensøkonomien.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: På julaften må Team Scorpion forhindre en katastrofe når styrtregn skaper en stor sprekk i en demning, som truer med å utslette en hel by i dens kjølvann.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: White Out
programme.desc: For å redde en amerikansk spesialstyrkeenhet fra en sikker død, må Team Scorpion trosse bitende minusgrader i Antarktis.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester står ansikt til ansikt med sin fraværende far, en pensjonert general, som ber Team Scorpion om hjelp, overbevist om at en diktator i Afrika har funnet et masseødeleggelsesvåpen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion har i oppgave å hjelpe NASAs topphemmelige rakettoppskyting, men de må sabotere sitt eget oppdrag når Walters date fra forrige kveld har en bombe festet til brystet hennes.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Fractured
programme.desc: Etter at et kraftig jordskjelv rammer Los Angeles, må Team Scorpion fikse en fastklemt gassledning for å forhindre en massiv eksplosjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Adaptation
programme.desc: Mens Team Scorpion jobber for å stoppe en tilstrømning av narkotika som blir smuglet inn i landet via droner, gir Walter Happy og Toby et ultimatum for deres nye forhold.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Fast and the Nerdiest
programme.desc: Teamet må infiltrere en eksklusiv bilsmuglingsoperasjon som er i ferd med å sende biovåpen til Sør-Amerika.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ticker
programme.desc: Når blodforsyningen til Los Angeles blir hacket og ansett som ubrukelig, må Team Scorpion finne den skyldige og redde en ung jente som desperat trenger en hjertetransplantasjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: Cabe blir tatt til fange under et hemmelig oppdrag i Djibouti sammen med sin nye Homeland-protégé Tim Armstrong, og Team Scorpion må redde ham.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Twist and Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpions oppdrag for redde restene av falne marinesoldater i Vietnam er truet sammen med livet deres når en dødelig tornado kommer direkte mot dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Teamet blir hyret av forsvarsdepartementet for å bryte seg inn i Fort Knox og "stjele" en dyrebar gjenstand for å teste sikkerheten deres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion drar til Tsjernobyl for å reparere den forefallende atomreaktoren før en katastrofal nedsmelting, men må også redde Sylvester og Paige når de blir fanget inne.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Toby or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må være smartere enn deres ustabile eks-Scorpion-medlem, Mark Collins, etter at han kidnapper Toby og truer med å drepe ham med mindre hans utspekulerte krav blir oppfylt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: More Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må legge problemene til side når anonyme hackere med ukjente motiver tar kontroll over amerikanske militærfly og krigsskip og retter våpen mot amerikanske byer.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: Akkurat i det teamet gjør fremskritt mot hackerne som kontrollerer amerikanske krigsskip, får de vite at en amerikansk atomubåt også er blitt hacket.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Når Walter ved et uhell blir skutt ut i verdensrommet i en rakett, hallusinerer han om Paige mens oksygenet hans går tom, og Team Scorpion jobber febrilsk for å finne en måte å få ham hjem før han blir kvalt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Teamet må finne en gutt fra Ralphs klasse som forsvinner på en ekskursjon etter å ha støtt på en dødelig forbryter.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Team Scorpions enkle jobb ved Natural History Museum i Los Angeles blir dødelig når de oppdager tyver som raner en utstilling med sjeldne edelstener for å berike en atombombe.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Karlstad
programme.desc: Tareq visits sunny Karlstad! Here, food is prepared by Vänern's shores and in Värmland's deep forests. Butter-fried Zander, crepes and cooking over an open fire are on the menu.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of (Part 2)
programme.desc: Once again, Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lund
programme.desc: In this episode, Tareq visits Lund, a thousand-year old city in southern Sweden. Lund is surrounded by the richest farmland in the country, and we explore nearby islands and meet entrepreneurs making highly-regarded local products.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Tareq sails out to Bornholm, a Danish island close to southern tip of Sweden. The islanders are fiercely self-sufficient and this attitude reflects in the huge number of food producers making products that are sold both locally and internationally.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Jokkmokk
programme.desc: Far above the Arctic Circle, Tareq explores the wild country around Jokkmokk. Here, the Sami people lived from what the land provides for thousands of years. This wild cuisine is as extreme as the weather here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Åland’s shipping fleet was the envy of navies around the world, and their sea trade was encouraged by the seafood, grains and fruits that thrive on these islands. Tareq prepares recipes to reflect Åland’s unique cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Finland's South Coast
programme.desc: Tareq takes a late autumn trip along Finland’s southern coast. He stops in the capital Helsinki to see how the city's food culture is about to be discovered by the rest of the world, and dives into the freezing waters around Ekenäs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kiruna
programme.desc: Tareq arrives in Kiruna, over 200km north of the Arctic Circle. With the weather getting down to -30C, Tareq takes part in snow picnics, firing up the smoker, and using snow and ice as part of the recipes he prepares.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bergen
programme.desc: Surrounded by some of the most beautiful landscapes in northern Europe, Bergen has become a centre for the finest seafood in northern Europe. Tareq heads into this winter wonderland to see the curious cuisine that has developed in western Norway.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Faroe Islands
programme.desc: Tareq comes to understand what is in the soul of the Faroese, and why their cuisine has developed the way it has. We explore the beautiful capital Torshavn and surrounding villages, and sail into a cave for a recipe prepared on a rowboat.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Central Jutland
programme.desc: Volcanoes and glaciers shaped this part of the country, leaving a giant fjord and pre-historic fossils in their wake. Farmers and food innovators work closely with nature to prepare food with the area’s plentiful herbs and award-winning seafood.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Tareq goes back to Åland to explore more of this island territory. Tareq finds a chef setting up a huge food village, sees forts left over from various invaders over the centuries, and learns about beer being recreated from 200 year old DNA.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Tornedalen
programme.desc: There are not many places like Tornedalen. A rushing river has provided for locals for centuries, and the very fertile land has yielded amazing crops for centuries.Tareq explores the traditions and the food that are part of the short summer season.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Jutland
programme.desc: At the northern-most part of Denmark, you are always close to raw, beautiful nature, and incredible sunlight that has drawn artists here for over 100 years. Tareq visits a salt maker using medieval techniques and experiences the magic light of Skagen.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: East Denmark
programme.desc: East Denmark contains some of Denmark’s most fertile lands, and many traditional farmers are converting to organic production and winning awards for their cheeses and wine. Tareq bikes through an area of limestone cliffs and Viking ships.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kristianstad
programme.desc: Located in Sweden’s south, beautiful Kristianstad is a 400-year old town surrounded by the ocean, fertile farmland and protected wetlands to aid the environment. Tareq makes his own chocolate and learns all about the art of eel-fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Southwest Jutland
programme.desc: Tareq visits Sydvestjylland – a unique area in Denmark filled with endless contrasts. Many food innovators are using the surrounding environment to take old traditions and apply them to the 21st century.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Nynäshamn
programme.desc: Sunny Nynäshamn is a resort town close to Stockholm, but there is more here than the sea. Tareq meets a prize-winning chocolate maker using ingredients from her garden, visits a thriving local food market, and gets a lesson in how to smoke fish.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Røros
programme.desc: Born as a mining town in the 17th century, Røros is now a center for local and organic food producers. Tareq tries dairy products which Michelin-starred chefs swear by, goes skiing and sledding around Røros many hilly streets

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Vimmerby
programme.desc: Vimmerby is known as the birthplace of beloved author Astrid Lindgren. Tareq finds that the area is also well-regarded for its cuisine. From the children’s theme park to the friendly moose that roam the hills, Vimmerby has a lot to offer visitors.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Trysil
programme.desc: The mountains and snowfall in Trysil mean that the town has to be creative with food; Tareq learns how to make cheese in the traditional way, and goes skiing of course, and takes to the slopes to cook something as skiers pass by.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Värmland
programme.desc: Värmland is home to many of Sweden’s most famous authors and inventors. However, it is also a place with a rich food culture. Tareq gets his hands on a very rare bird to cook and also takes time out to float down a tranquil river on a wooden raft.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the death of a family friend is ruled an accident, Don and Charlie investigate, only to make a startling discovery.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The bombing of an influential charity's headquarters forces the team to sift through various rumors about the true reach of the organization's power.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a vigilante group goes after a known criminal mastermind, Charlie is forced to turn to his rival for help. Also, Don wrestles with his emotions towards embracing religion.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don looks toward his newly found religious beliefs to help him contend with an escaped criminal bent on revenge.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team has only four hours to stop a group of hijackers who take a bus full of Hollywood tourists hostage.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A feud between rival Chinese gangs leads to the kidnapping of an undercover agent and the re-appearance of the enigmatic Samuel Kraft.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A stolen pair of "kicks" leads the team into the world of sneaker collecting after a foreign Ambassador finds his prized pair missing.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When Robin's seemingly strong case against a weapons smuggler falls apart, the team decides to look into the jury who heard the case.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: To stop a new drug from hitting the streets, Charlie devises a plan that could put Liz in harm's way.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a super computer is the prime suspect in the death of cutting-edge scientist, the team must use new means to crack the case. Meanwhile, Charlie weighs a compelling job offer.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team has only hours to investigate a last minute tip that could exonerate a dangerous mob boss on the eve of his execution. Meanwhile, Charlie attempts to help the CalSci basketball team break their incredible losing streak.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The investigation into a professor's death takes a dangerous turn when the team finds their lead suspect has ties to a radical animal rights group.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the FBI is called in to investigate a series of home invasions, the team uses Charlie and his math skills to help profile the suspects, but when his calculations go awry during a raid, Don suffers a life-threatening injury.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Still feeling responsible for Don's near-fatal stabbing, Charlie puts his focus into tracking down an unnoticed serial killer, with the agents revisiting math theories from when Charlie first started working with the team to help solve the case.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team investigate a string of copycat bank robberies and zero in on disgraced FBI Agent Roger Bloom as a suspect when they discover he has been studying the files of some of the original bank heists.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When Amita is abducted, Don and the team's frantic search for her leads them to a charismatic sociopath, but it is up to a distraught Charlie to discover what the suspect's bizarre plans for her are on the fifth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team must protect high-profile activist Benjamin Polk at a political rally, but it soon becomes a manhunt when they search for a sniper trying to kill Polk. Also, Charlie awaits an answer from Amita, on the sixth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When two FBI agents, part of a unit headed by Don's former mentor, are killed during a shootout with bank robbers, the team must investigate what exactly happened. Also, Charlie and Amita worry when Larry opts not to attend a conference in Geneva.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team are called in to investigate who is behind a deadly gambling ring that is running a high-stakes Russian roulette tournament. Also, Don and Charlie become concerned about Alan's financial health.

programme.title: Small Time Crooks
programme.desc: Ray Winkler (Woody Allen) er en ekskjeltring med store drømmer og med en manglende evne til å holde på oppvaskejobbene. Hans kone Frenchy (Tracey Ullman) er en sardonisk manikyrist som tøyler Ray i et forsøk på å få han ned på jorden.

programme.title: Magic in the Moonlight
programme.desc: Magikeren Stanley Crawford (Colin Firth) er skeptisk til alt som kan karakteriseres som "overnaturlig", men når han møter den forførende spåkvinnen Sophie Baker (Emma Stone), oppdager han en verden hinsides fysikkens lover.

programme.title: Hercules in New York
programme.desc: Bannlyst fra Olympus, blir Hercules (Arnold Schwarzenegger) sendt til Jorden, hvor han finner ekte kjærlighet og starter en lysende karriere som kroppsbygger.

programme.title: Girls Just Want to Have Fun
programme.desc: Velkommen til en katolsk jenteskole i hjertet av Chicago, hjemstedet til USAs favorittdanseshow: Dance TV! Utvekslingsstudenten Janey Glenn er et nervevrak når hun blir introdusert for sine fnisende klassekamerater av den strenge søster Katherine.

programme.title: Big Top Pee-Wee
programme.desc: Pee-Wee Herman er en enkel bonde i en liten by. Men plutselig kommer en kraftig storm. Et sirkus ender opp på Pee-Wees gård. Så han lar sirkuset bli der en stund, og det bestemmer seg for å lage et show med en elskverdig figur: Pee-Wee!

programme.title: Pumping Iron
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger og Lou Ferrigno møter hverandre i en intens konkurranse om Mr. Olympia-tittelen i denne kritikerroste filmen som gjorde Schwarzenegger berømt.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Bill Murray spiller Tripper Harrison, sjefsveileder på Camp North Star. Det blir underholdende når han, og den skandaløse gjengen hans av leirveiledere, har det for seg å bryte alle regler i boka.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: På Westerburg High, hvor klikker hersker, jocks dominerer og alle de populære jentene heter Heather, vil det kreve en Veronica og et mystisk nytt barn for å gi tenåringsangst en kroppstelling.

programme.title: Tokyo Fist
programme.desc: Forretningsmannen Tsuda møter barndomsvennen Tajuki, som er blitt semiprofesjonell bokser. Tsuda mistenker snart at hans forlovede er utro med Tajuki, og etter en krangel trener han hardt til en voldsom og blodig konfrontasjon.

programme.title: Drunken Tai Chi
programme.desc: This film follows the ups and downs of Cheng Do as he stumbles his way through his journey to avenge the assassination of his father and brother.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Last Angry Mailman
programme.desc: En butikkjede vil gjerne kjøpe Cliffs familiehjem og bygge det om til et supermarked, men Cliff motsetter seg planene. Gjengen får vite at Rebeccas kallenavn på skolen var "Backseat Becky".

programme.title: Cheers NO: Bidding on the Boys
programme.desc: Sam og Woody byr seg frem for salg på en auksjon til inntekt for et veldedig formål, men de er ikke særlig begeistret over sine nye "eiere".

programme.title: Cheers NO: Puddinhead Boyd
programme.desc: Woody innleder et forhold til en gammel dame, som han møtte mens han var utkledd som Mark Twain.

programme.title: Cheers NO: A Kiss Is Still a Kiss
programme.desc: Rebecca mener at sjefen hennes har fått feil inntrykk av henne, og for å rette på det ber hun Sam om å bli med henne på et jobbarrangement.
programme.sub-title: A Kiss Is Still a Kiss

programme.title: Cheers NO: My Fair Clavin
programme.desc: Cliff hjelper kjæresten sin med å forbedre utseende sitt, men angrer når hun får oppmerksomhet fra alle kanter, også fra Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Christmas Cheers
programme.desc: Julaften blir en trist affære i baren etter at Rebecca ber alle om å jobbe sent.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Woody for Hire Meets Norman of the Apes
programme.desc: Woody prøver å overbevise vennene sine om at han har fått en rolle i en TV-serie.
programme.sub-title: Woody for Hire Meets Norman of the Apes

programme.title: Cheers NO: And God Created Woodman
programme.desc: Woody tar på seg skylden da Rebecca knuser en vase på en firmafest, og han ender opp som kompis med sjefen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Tale of Two Cuties
programme.desc: Til Rebeccas store forargelse ansetter Mr. Drake en pen, ung kvinne som bartender på Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Yacht of Fools
programme.desc: Evan Drake inviterer Rebecca og Sam til å tilbringe en helg om bord i båten hans.

programme.title: Cheers NO: To All the Girls I've Loved Before
programme.desc: Frasiers utdrikningslag utvikler seg til en dyster feiring.
programme.sub-title: To All the Girls I've Loved Before

programme.title: Cheers NO: Let Sleeping Drakes Lie
programme.desc: Rebecca blir tatt på fersk gjerning på Evan Drakes soverom.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Airport V
programme.desc: Carla får hjelp av Frasier til å overvinne flyskrekken. Rebecca venter i spenning på et besøk fra en restaurantkritiker.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Sam in the Gray Flannel Suit
programme.desc: Rebecca blir sjalu når Sam blir forfremmet, helt til hun får vite årsaken til forfremmelsen.
programme.sub-title: The Sam in the Gray Flannel Suit

programme.title: Cheers NO: Our Hourly Bread
programme.desc: Woody foreslår for Rebecca at de lodder ut en ferie i Karibien for å få baren ut av det økonomiske uføret.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Slumber Party Massacred
programme.desc: Etter at Carla får vite at hun snart skal bli bestemor, inviterer Lilith og Rebecca henne på overnattingsfest for å muntre henne opp.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Bar Wars
programme.desc: Gjengen på Cheers går til krig mot en rivaliserende bar.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Big Kiss-Off
programme.desc: Sam og Woody inngår et veddemål om hvem som klarer å kysse Rebecca først.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Backseat Becky, Upfront
programme.desc: Rebecca prøver desperat å få Evan Drake på tomannshånd før han flytter til Japan.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca får seg en overraskelse når Sam blir utnevnt til sjef på Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca forteller Sam at hun heretter bare vil være sammen med eldre menn som kan fremme hennes karriere, men så møter hun sin unge, nye sjef.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam reiser til Mexico for å åpne en ny bar, mens Rebecca prøver å avslå sjefens frieri.
programme.sub-title: One Happy Chappy in a Snappy Serape

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla mistenker Eddie for å flørte med en annen kvinne.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Norm har blitt interiørarkitekt, men prøver å holde det hemmelig.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Cliff endrer personlighet etter et sykehusopphold. Sam prøver å lære Lilith å kjøre bil.
programme.sub-title: How to Win Friends and Electrocute People

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Gjengen på Cheers bestemmer seg for å begynne med fallskjermhopping.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam er tiltrukket av en ekskjæreste og hennes voksne datter. Woody stiller opp som klovn i bursdagsselskapet til sjefens sønn.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: De ansatte på Cheers konkurrerer mot sine erkerivaler i baren Gary’s Old Towne Tavern om hvem som lager byens beste Bloody Mary.
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars II: Woodman Strikes Back

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca tilbyr seg å passe huset for en av styremedlemmene i firmaet, men hun må be Sam og Woody om hjelp når hun mister mannens høyt elskede hund.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Cliffs lojalitet blir satt på prøve da hans nye kjæreste, som også jobber på posten, begår et regelbrudd på hans vegne.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woody bestemmer seg for å stjele kjæresten til en snobbete riking etter at han fornærmer ham.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Lilith og Frasier får øvd seg på foreldrerollen når de er barnevakt for Carlas veslevoksne sønn.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam prøver så godt han kan å holde tritt med sin unge, sportsgale kjæreste. Rebecca prøver å imponere sjefen ved å reklamere for Norms malerfirma.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Lilith overtaler Frasier til å gi avkall på det urbane liv og flytte til en hytte i skogen.

programme.title: Cops: Bumming a Smoke
programme.desc: A runaway motorcycle tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: Cops: Neighborhood Rage
programme.desc: A suspect ditches his bike when stopped and tries to outrun the police. Neighbors fight out a road rage incident with rocks and a baseball bat.

programme.title: Cops: My Bills Won't Wait
programme.desc: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs.

programme.title: Cops: Family Therapy
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Cops: Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked.

programme.title: Cops: Nightvision
programme.desc: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman.

programme.title: Cops: Now It's Lawn Furniture
programme.desc: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit's help.

programme.title: Cops: Don't Make her Angry
programme.desc: A man needs police assistance when his angry ex-girlfriend crawls through his window. Police must play hide-and-seek when they attempt to execute an arrest warrant.

programme.title: Cops: And Through the Woods
programme.desc: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight.

programme.title: Cops: Fight and Flight
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: Cops: Who Let the Dogs Out?
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: Cops: Dead Man Flushing
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: Cops: Pistol Packin' Families
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: Cops: Grown Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: Cops: Kill 'Em With Kindness
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: Cops: The Fighting Kind
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: Cops: Cell Phone Secrets
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops: Guns, Hash, and Fire Hydrants
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: Cops: Get Off My Roof
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: Cops: This Man Stabbed Me
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: Cops: Blood and Scars, Bro!
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: Cops: My Jewelry's Fragile
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: Cops: Fast Food Escape
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: Cops: Late Night Snacks
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: Cops: Cops We Run the Show
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: Cops: Doggie Paddle
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: Cops: Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: Police investigate suspicious activity in a known drug area, officers encounter a jaywalker with the munchies, and a woman caught with meth wants points for honesty.

programme.title: Cops: You Didn't Get Very Far
programme.desc: A man complains of heart trouble after running from police, a suspect in a stolen car leads officers on a wild chase, and police check on a disabled vehicle and its occupants.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Not My Text Messages
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: Cops: Hands Off the Junk
programme.desc: The driver of a stolen car leads police on a winding chase, undercover officers run a prostitution sting, and a woman's domestic disturbance call leads to her own arrest.

programme.title: Cops: Dealt a Bad Hand
programme.desc: Suspects flee an overturned auto, a man is accused of battery with a chain leash, and an unlucky gambler is dealt another losing hand by police when he decides to drive drunk.

programme.title: Cops: Batter Up
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: Cops: Mohawked Cleaning Service
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: Cops: The Runaways
programme.desc: A driver pursued by police bails from her moving vehicle, a jaywalker decides to run from officers, and a patrol encounters a little boy who decided to run away from home.

programme.title: Cops: Perfume Takedown
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: Cops: Put Your Clothes Back On
programme.desc: A disoriented suspect would rather take a shower than comply with officers, a stolen vehicle sting nets a surprisingly young driver, and a traffic stop leads to a drug arrest.

programme.title: Cops: Tazed and Confused
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: Cops: Cruisin' the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot en galakse med enestående action og eventyr når kaptein Jean-Luc Picard (Patrick Stewart) og hans Starship-mannskap kjempet mot en farlig motstander... Som har en overraskende kobling til Picard!

programme.title: Star Trek I: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: Når et uidentifisert romvesen ødelegger tre kraftfulle Klingon-kryssere, vender kaptein James T. Kirk (William Shatner) tilbake til det nylig ombyggede U.S.S. Enterprise(tm) for å ta kommandoen.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)
programme.desc: A damaged bike belonging to Karine Schaaff, 16, is found abandoned by the side of a road in Moselle.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair
programme.desc: On the night of April 16, 2013, Anaïs Guillaume, 21, mysteriously disappears in Fromy (Ardennes) after spending the evening at her companion's farm.
programme.sub-title: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)
programme.desc: On Sunday, April 29, 2007, the body of Jennifer Charron, 21-years old, was found burnt to a crisp in a forest near Royan. The young waitress, who had been missing for two days, was visibly beaten and tied up.
programme.sub-title: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Disappeared Of Nancy: The Julie Martin Affair
programme.desc: On June 30, 2014, in Nancy, the police are called to the home of Julie Martin, a 34-year-old nurse.
programme.sub-title: The Disappeared Of Nancy: The Julie Martin Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)
programme.desc: The lifeless, mutilated body of a woman is found in the Rambouillet Forest.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case
programme.desc: On September 12, 2013, Eric Mosser, a 45-year-old heating engineer, discovers his wife Isabelle lying in a pool of blood at their home in Illfurth, Alsace.
programme.sub-title: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murderous Lovers - Anne Bardot
programme.desc: The disturbing missing case in Paris of 4 years old.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)
programme.desc: On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had found her unconscious in the bathroom with a mysterious plastic bag next to her
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Jean-Jacques Le Page Case
programme.desc: On the morning of July 24th 2009, a fire erupts at house in Plougonvelin.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Four Lovers For One Crime: The Joël Deprez Affair
programme.desc: On February 5, 2000, two hunters discover a charred body on the banks of the Oise.
programme.sub-title: Four Lovers For One Crime: The Joël Deprez Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Émilie Godest Case
programme.desc: On November 9th 2007, around 11:30PM, aid arrives on the scene of an accident at the exit of Chateney-en-France.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)
programme.desc: Laetitia Perrais, 18, a trainee hotel waitress, vanishes after evening service.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle
programme.desc: On March 19th 1998, Akira Ojima, a 57 years old japanese architect, is found dead in the fridge of a villa in Nanterre.
programme.sub-title: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Priscillia Ciatti Case
programme.desc: The corpse of Priscillia Ciatti, 14, is discovered by the side of a field, a few hundred metres from her family home. The teenager has been stabbed sixty times with a knife and –an extra sordid detail – a devil mask is found next to her body.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case
programme.desc: On March 28th 2013, the burnt body of Anne Barbot, 38 years old, is discovered in a forest of Maine-et-Loire.
programme.sub-title: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake
programme.desc: On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows?
programme.sub-title: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 608
programme.desc: I 2011 velger Sabina å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men allerede et par dager etter operasjonen oppdager hun at brystene hennes henger.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 202
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Pernille, som føler seg fanget i sitt eget hjem, og Linda, som er så hemmet av et arr på magen at hun møter opp tidlig på jobb for å unngå å skifte med andre.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 902
programme.desc: Etter en brystoperasjon har Samantha tunge, smertefulle bryster og et skrantende forhold.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 609
programme.desc: For 21 år siden havnet Allan i en voldsom sykkelulykke. Allan er merket for livet, og til tross for flere operasjoner sitter han igjen med arr i ansiktet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Vi møter Jeanette, som føler seg som en forsøkskanin etter en rekke mislykkede operasjoner. Maria måtte fjerne implantatene sine, og er nå uten bryster. Shahin har smerter etter en ansiktsløftning.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 311
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Maria, som etter 11 operasjoner har fått det hun kaller verdens styggeste bryster. Rose fikk en bredere nese etter at hun opererte den.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi Jette, som har valgt ikke å amme sine tre barn på grunn av silikonbrystene sine, og Charlotte som fremdeles har kjøttsår på innsiden av låret etter fettsuging.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 103
programme.desc: Ivana endte ikke bare opp med å bruke en million kroner i USA, men hun ble også offer for en fatal beslutning, tatt av legene mens hun lå i narkose

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Gjennom hele livet har 61 år gamle Lis ønsket å forandre sine små bryster. Derfor valgte hun å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon, men kort tid etter opplevde hun at det påvirket sexlivet hennes.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 903
programme.desc: Nanna har hatt flere brystoperasjoner og korrigeringer, men sitter nå igjen med deformerte, harde bryster. På grunn av operasjonene vil hun ikke at noen skal se henne naken.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi Anita som våkner opp med større bryster enn hun hadde avtalt med kirurgen og nå føler seg som en mini-versjon av Linse Kessler.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: For tre år siden valgte Sarah å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon i Polen, men etter operasjonen syntes hun brystene hennes så ut som to kaffeposer med implantater.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 613
programme.desc: Når sønnen endelig blir frisk, føler Charlott seg ikke lenger som seg selv, og hun velger derfor å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men resultatet ble en stor skuffelse.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 407
programme.desc: Vi møter Maria, som etter en brystoperasjon fikk store abscesser og hull helt inn til implantatet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 203
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Pia, som fikk stafylokokker etter en brystforstørrende operasjon og måtte gå i seks måneder med bare ett implantat.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 701
programme.desc: Etter en alvorlig ulykke, hvor Dan faller ned fra et tak og lander på ansiktet, opereres han to ganger for å rette opp nesen sin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 510
programme.desc: Etter fødselen velger Camilla å operere brystene. Det viser seg imidlertid at kirurgen ved en feil har brukt tråder som ikke er selvoppløsende, og Camilla lever i dag med store sår.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 610
programme.desc: Sportsgale Jeanette ble inspirert for 12 år siden av en trend i treningsstudioet, hvor vennene hennes fikk forstørret brystene. I motsetning til venninnene liker hun ikke de nye, store puppene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: I 2010 fikk Birthe satt inn saltvannsimplantater i stedet for de vanlige silikonimplantatene. 5 år senere våkner hun til et skremmende syn - det ene implantatet hennes er borte.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 605
programme.desc: Når Annika ble 30 år, fikk hun penger til en skjønnhetsoperasjon av mannen sin. Paret reiser sammen til Litauen, men allerede på operasjonsdagen oppdager Annika at den litauiske kirurgen ikke gjorde det de hadde avtalt.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.
