programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tash On Tours
programme.desc: Med Charlotte i hus igjen, tenker alle på Gary og Marnie og om de vil ligge sammen igjen. Gjengen tar 'Tash-On' - turer til Manchester for å vise Geordie-taktikken på singel-kveldene: Bli dritings og klin i vei.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Boy
programme.desc: Det spisser seg til når Aaron overhører Vicky og jentene sladre om ham samme kveld han har tredje date med Vicky. Og mens gutta jobber ute, får jentene en kjempeoverraskelse - en ny gutt, Kyle, kommer for å bli en del av familien.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Trip To Iceland
programme.desc: Den nye gutten Kyle gjør seg hjemmekoselig i huset gjennom å tilbringe natten med Holly, og Geordie-gjengen og deres 'Tash on Tours' blir internasjonale når de flyr til Reykjavik på Island for utagerende festing.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Marnie Exposes Gary
programme.desc: Etter å ha sjekket ut Islands gutter, jenter og geysirer, vender Geordie-gjengen tilbake til Toon. Der spisser det seg til når Aaron og Scott får høre sannheten om Gary og Marnie, og Garys tvilsomme guttekodeks.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Boss
programme.desc: Buzzin! Våre favorittfestløver er tilbake og alle sjokkeres av at Vicky blir sjefen deres. Holly vil ikke virke billig, derfor vil hun ikke ligge med Kyle, og Marnie dumper Aaron når hun oppdager at han har løyet for henne.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Party Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Holly har fest, men gutta braker sammen når Marnie prøver å gjøre Aaron sjalu ved å kline med Kyle. Sjefen Vicky arrangerer singelkveld for homofile, og Charlotte avslører at det kan bli slutt med kjæresten.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Bonjour Geordies
programme.desc: Ooh la la! Gjengen drar til Paris for en jobb med Tash-On Tours, men kan Aaron tilgi Kyle for at han kysset Marnie? Vicky blir uprofesjonelt stupfull på jobben, og når de kommer hjem, drar Charlotte for å prate med kjæresten sin.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Single Charlotte
programme.desc: Charlotte og Gary nærmer seg hverandre etter at hun kommer tilbake fra et oppgjør med kjæresten. Vicky strever med å overbevise Marnie om å ta jobben på alvor, og klørne kommer ut i en fryktelig krangel.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Marnie & Scott's Mistake
programme.desc: En utekveld i Sunderland ender i katastrofe når Aaron ser Marnie og Scott være litt mer intime enn han kan godta, og gutta skværer opp. Samtidig utvikler Charlotte og Garys forhold seg med stor styrke.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gary And The Farm Girl
programme.desc: Goerdie-gjengen drar ut på veiene for nok en Tash-On Tour for unge bønder i Gloucestershire. 'Gale Charlotte' vender tilbake når hun ser Gary prate med en annen jente, og Holly og Kyle blir mer intime enn aldri før.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Blue Skull Crew
programme.desc: Gary later som han får en tatovering av Charlottes initialer bak øret, men hun friker ut og sier noe hun angrer etterpå. Dramatikk oppstår mellom Aaron og Marnie, Holly mister tilliten til Kyle, og Gary og Scott begynner nesten å slåss.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Christmas Comes Early
programme.desc: Det er jul i Geordie Shore-huset! Men det blir tårer blant glitteret når Vicky dukker opp med triste nyheter. Kyle håper at han får en julegave fra Holly, og Gaz og Char prøver å løse sine problemer. Seriens siste episode.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Boys' Secret Pact
programme.desc: Herlig! Favorittpartyløvene er her igjen! Charlotte klekker ut en plan når hun hører om pakten mellom Gary og Aaron, men vil det ende med at hun får egg i fjeset? Imens erJames i tvil om han har en framtid i huset.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Arrivals
programme.desc: Det blir store forandringer i huset når James kommer med en sjokkbeskjed og to nye romkamerater dukker opp. Men nykommernes første utekveld blir spolert når det oppstår en kjempekrangel mellom Charlotte, Marnie og Holly.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gary's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Det er de nyes første morgen i huset, men hvordan skal familien samles, når Holly, Kyle og Charlotte er vekk? Holly åpner sitt hjerte for Kyle, men føler han det samme? En overraskende avsløring fra Gary knuser Charlottes hjerte.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Charlotte's Broken Heart
programme.desc: Det er dagen Charlotte har fryktet. Gary introduserer sin nye kjæreste for familien men vil Psycho Charlotte dukke opp? Imens blir Marnie og Aaron mere og mere fristet av hverandres flørting.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: King Nathan
programme.desc: Når Anna forteller Geordiene at hun har jobb til dem i et annet land, blir alle heltent! Helt til de havner på en campingplass i Wales. Marnie vil få fortalt Aaron noen sannhetens ord, noe som fører til at de ender i senga sammen.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Holly's Big Decision
programme.desc: Hamburg skal få oppleve en ekte Tash-On Tours-tilstelning, men er de klare for at Marnie hopper på Aaron? Holly er paranoid når det gjelder ikke-forholdet til Kyle og Chloe og Nathan kommer, til alles forundring, nærmere hverandre.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Chloe's Big Meltdown
programme.desc: Den nye Chloe møter psykopat-Charlotte da en helaften går på skeive, og Hollys ankomst får en bitter ettersmak når hun hører den egentlige grunnen til hvorfor Kyle ikke vil være sammen med henne. Er det slutt nå?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Making It Official
programme.desc: Scotty T kommer tilbake og tar spranget når han inviterer alle med på et våget eventyr. Det er anspendt i huset mens Holly venter på Kyles beslutning. Har fortiden hennes ødelagt deres muligheter for en fremtid, eller vil han binde seg?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Hurricane Situation
programme.desc: Medboerne kommer hjem fra Italia, og gleder seg over å være tilbake. Men et drama er i emning idet Mike truer med å ødelegge Snookis forhold til Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Man Down
programme.desc: Vinny vurderer om han skal bli eller reise hjem til Staten Island. Snooki krangler med Jionni, og alle er tilbake til gamle takter: festing og sol.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dropping Like Flies
programme.desc: Deltakerne sliter med å venne seg til livet uten Vinny, mens Mike konfronterer sine indre demoner. Men det er også Paulys bursdag, og han får sitt livs beste gave!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Vinny
programme.desc: Mike kommer tilbake, bare for å finne ut at Danny har truet med å finne nye medboere! Jentene leier strippere til Pauly og Mikes ville bursdagsfest, og deltakerne reiser til Staten Island for å kidnappe Vinny. Men vil han bli med dem?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Nothing But Nice
programme.desc: Vinny kommer tilbake, og alle feirer. Mike prøver å være hyggelig, men ender opp med å irritere guttene. Snooki sliter med en ubehagelig situasjon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Follow Game
programme.desc: The Situation samler opplysninger for å ødelegge for en av de andre, og for en gangs skyld er det ikke Snooki. JWoww får panikk fordi Roger har forsvunnet og ikke ringer henne tilbake.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Love at the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Alle deltakerne er konsentrert om sine nåværende kjærester, men det er aldri fred og ro i huset. En av deltakerne skaper drama for The Meatballs, mens Jennis utfordrende klær skaper problemer for Roger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sharp Objects
programme.desc: Deltakerne prøver å unngå et haiangrep på fisketur. Jenni konfronterer Paulys stalker. Snooki ser seg ut Vinny da hun blir avvist av kjæresten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Mike klarer ikke å vente lenger med å avsløre 'sannheten' for Snookis kjæreste. Pauly, Vinny og Deena synes det er vanskelig å være de single i huset.
programme.sub-title: The Truth Will Set You Free

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Meatball Stands Alone
programme.desc: Da Mike forteller Jionni om ham og Snooki, blir det bråk. Deena må takle sannheten om Joey. Noen fra huset drar på camping, mens Vinny og Pauly drar den største spøken i hele Shore-historien!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 502
programme.desc: Her møtes Mike, Snooki, Pauly og Deena og snakker om å komme tilbake til Seaside Heights, og om Vinnys hjemlengsel. Og når gjengen gjennomgår dramatikken mellom Mike og Snooki, heiter det seg til en smule.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 504
programme.desc: Vi møter Mike, Vinny og Deena som snakker om da Vinny kom tilbake til strandhuset, om Mikes forhold til Paula og Paulys forhold til...vel, alle andre. Og vi får en snikkikk på neste episode!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 507
programme.desc: Det er damenes aften og Jenni, Sammi, Snooki og Deena skravler om Jennis kjærlighetstrøbbel med Roger, om kjøttbollegreier og Guidette-problemer. Og vi får en snikkikk på hva vi har i vente.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gym, Tan, Look Back
programme.desc: Jerseygjengen tar et tilbakeblikk på sin reise sammen de siste tre årene. Amerikas yndlingssamboere forteller i intervjuer sine unike historier om uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Og en sniktitt på sesong 6 er med.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Once More Unto the Beach
programme.desc: Alle kommer til strandhuset en siste gang. The Situation forteller ærlig om rehabiliteringen og Snooki må møte den utfordringen det er å være gravid i et hus skapt for festing og moro.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: No Shame, Good Integrity
programme.desc: Romkameratene installerer seg i strandhuset og Deena må takle å være adskilt fra kjæresten sin. Nicole kommer med en kunngjøring som sjokkerer hele huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Toxic Shots Syndrome
programme.desc: Snooki flytter ut av strandhuset for seg selv og Dina sliter uten kjøttbollen sin. Mike må takle baksiden av rehabiliteringen etter å ha fått behandling av en lege.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Blues, Balls, & Brawls
programme.desc: Jenny planlegger en overraskelsesfest på Rogers bursdag som faller litt i fisk. Deena prøver ut Danny som kjøttbolle. Vennegjengen befinner seg plutselig midt i et digert basketak på klubben og en av dem meies ned i håndgemengen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Merp Walk
programme.desc: Jenny får vite omfanget av skaden sin. Mike vurderer å gå et skritt videre i forholdet til Paula. Når Deena holder kjøttbolle-auditioner, ender det med at hun selv triller ut av panna og rett ned i bålet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Let's Make it Official
programme.desc: Jenni lurer på hvordan det går mellom henne og Roger og forstår at de kanskje er verre ute og kjøre enn hun trodde. Mike vil ta forholdet med Paula et skritt videre...til han får virkeligheten i fanget.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Great Meatballs of Fire
programme.desc: Mike prøver å tilpasse seg å være i et forhold, men blir forvirret rundt hvordan reglene egentlig funker. Deena går tilbake til sitt liv som kjøttbolle, men må kjempe med nebb og klør for sine festrettigheter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Control the Crazy
programme.desc: Sammi konfronterer Deena med hennes kjøttbolleutbrudd og de blir stående og stange. Mike og kompisene blir kjent med Paulas "ville" side, og Mike vet ikke helt om han kan takle det.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Make it Unofficial
programme.desc: Jenni planlegger en babyfest for Nicole og inviterer alle kameratene. Gutta støtter Mike som vil slå opp med Paula, og blir med ham for å oppleve øyeblikket fra første rad.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 403
programme.desc: I Stockholm tømmer Max søppeldunker i kjendistette nabolag. Jörgen transporterer en 25 tonn tung gryte i Skåne, og veien dit er både smal og ujevn.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 404
programme.desc: Spesialtransportøren Johan transporterer 30 meter lange trebjelker. Slamsugeren Magnus tar seg av en pumpegrop, en risikofylt jobb på grunn av de farlige gassene som produseres.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anton kjører en grusknuser oppe i Norrland, og Amanda er på et kloakkrenseanlegg med kranbilen sin for å hjelpe til med å tømme en silo.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 406
programme.desc: Max har byttet ut byluften med skjærgården, og dagens oppdrag er å tømme søppeldunker på Ingarö. To termoser med kaffe og Emanuel er klar for en hel dag i skogen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 407
programme.desc: Ingenting kan gå galt når Jörgen kjører en 70 tonns kran fra Värnamo til Helsingborg. Mickan kjører tømmer for første gang. Olivia transporterer kalver, men kalvene rømmer!

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 408
programme.desc: Mattias kjører over 100 kviger og okser til beite. Tove laster tømmer i skogene i Småland. Jörgen kjører en transformator, men alt fungerer ikke som det skal!

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 501
programme.desc: Jörgen kjører en 50 tonns transformator i Skåne – men problemene avløser hverandre. Mattias har reist til den finske grensen for å frakte alpakkaer. Emina leverer fisk i Skåne.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 502
programme.desc: Pappa Roine og Mattias laster høyballer – men plutselig stopper hjullasteren. Linda leverer drinker rundt i Stockholm – og benytter anledningen til å besøke forloveden Magnus. Piraten legger asfalt.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 503
programme.desc: Biltransportøren Robin må være ekstra forsiktig når han skal frakte en dyr Lincoln på lasteplanet! Det samme gjelder Micke som skal kjøre et dyrt spabad til Uddevalla.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 504
programme.desc: Tove kjører tømmer i Småland – og møter fans midt i skogen. Slamsugeren Magnus skal tømme et basseng på et renseanlegg. Kranfører Amanda er på et vindkraftverk på Gotland – men risikerer å miste båten.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 505
programme.desc: Elin sparker dagen i gang i Stockholm med komplisert lossing og tidspress. Tim kjører etsende last – og han må derfor være ekstra forsiktig på veiene. Peo sliter med containerne sine i Åre.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 506
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 507
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 508
programme.desc: Johannes skal levere brakker – men kaster ved et uhell nøklene på taket. Spesialtransportørene og ekteparet Anton og Angelica har en kjøretur sammen - til Norge. Emina kjører kjøtt i Skåne.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 701
programme.desc: I det nordlige vinterlandskapet må Anton stoppe transporten av et tungt toglokomotiv når tilhengeren går i stykker. Elin, en melkebilsjåfør, starter dagen rolig, helt til en melkeslange ryker og kaos oppstår.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 702
programme.desc: For Denkan fra Göteborg blir transporten et mareritt. Etter å ha reparert en lekk bremseklokke blinker lysene rødt. Bremsene overopphetes, og han må skynde seg dit med et brannslukningsapparat.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 703
programme.desc: Kellys stressende dag blir verre når det viser seg at flere bedrifter holder stengt på grunn av ferien. Emina må rekke en fotballkamp, men det blir full stopp hos den første kunden da hun ikke kommer seg inn på lageret.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 704
programme.desc: Når Roine laster okser, nekter de å gå opp på lastebilen. Og det er ikke lett å få okser på 1100 kg til å adlyde. Emina leverer fisk i sommervarmen, men havner bak saktegående feriegjester.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 705
programme.desc: Tove dekker opp for vikarer som har sommerferie og jobber derfor på dagtid. De nye arbeidstidene i det sommerlige Småland byr på andre problemer enn vanlig.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 706
programme.desc: Kranfører Carl har blitt bedt om å flytte en havnekran som veier nesten 200 tonn og er 33 meter høy. Men arbeidet må brått avbrytes fordi det er fare for at kranen kan velte når en del mangler.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes confessions, flirtations and meltdowns between the guys and girls are revealed in the never-before-seen footage.
programme.sub-title: The Guys and Girls Get Flirty

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Cycle 21 kicks off with girls AND guys back in the competition to take home the title of America's Next Top Model. 31 potential contestants rock the runway to see who can take the best selfie.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With only one week left to determine the Cycle 21 contestants, the semi-finalists tackle a rigorous Los Angeles subway challenge to model various seasons in a limited amount of time.
programme.sub-title: The Guy Who Gets a Second Chance

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 14 contestants move into their new home, just in time for tempers to flare and relationships to ignite. Models compete in a revealing runway challenge where the wardrobe consists only of silly string.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With a love triangle brewing in the house, not all models bring their A-game to an optical illusion photo shoot. The eagerly awaited make-over day arrives, and one model to unveils a never-before-seen look while another suffers a breakdown.
programme.sub-title: The Guy Who Gets a Beard Weave

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra teaches the models the three steps involved in making love to the camera to prep them for a sexy black widow-themed photo shoot. An unexpected chemistry occurs between two models just before a hair-raising challenge on stilts.
programme.sub-title: The Guy Who Starts a Fight

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models are tasked with mastering the ultimate hair whip for a wind-blown photo shoot while one pays a penalty and is allowed only five frames to capture the perfect image.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Got Five Frames

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Models test their acting chops to compete for a walk-on role on a scripted television series. A frozen photo shoot turns icy after hurtful comments are overheard at the house.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Models team up to for a photo shoot challenge with judge Kelly Cutrone resulting in two models recognizing the need to put their personal relationship on hold.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Says It's Over

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Miss J offers select models a private runway session in order to give them a leg up on Style Fashion Week, where the models are challenged to book fashion shows with different designers, including Betsey Johnson.
programme.sub-title: The Guy Who Wows Betsey Johnson

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A model is brought back into the competition after fans cast their vote via social media. A challenge to keep their composure in the dark at a former slaughterhouse with a dark and gruesome history gives models the chance to win a special treat.
programme.sub-title: The Girl with the Bloodcurdling Scream

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A look back on what has happened in the competition so far as well as a look inside the ANTM house and interactions between the models that we haven't seen before.
programme.sub-title: What Happens on ANTM Stays on ANTM

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The seven remaining models pack their bags for Seoul, Korea and find themselves challenged to a group dance photo shoot judged by Korean pop sensation BtoB.
programme.sub-title: The Guy Who Parties Too Hard

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models race to various locations around Seoul for a timed challenge, where one finds herself isolated from the rest of the group after getting caught in a lie.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Gets Caught in a Lie

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The five remaining models perform a bilingual scene with Korean soap opera actors before tackling a night-time photo shoot that has them dressing up to recreate iconic images of the King and Queen of American pop culture: Elvis Presley and Marilyn Monroe.
programme.sub-title: The Guy with Moves Like Elvis

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra Banks introduces the final four models to her new cosmetics line and challenges them to a commercial shoot with the help of some of the previously eliminated contestants.
programme.sub-title: Finale Part One: The Last Girl Standing

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Three very strong and different models are judged in a high-octane final runway fashion show in Seoul for designer Lie Sang Bong.
programme.sub-title: Finale Part Two: America's Next Top Model Is…

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Wants It So Bad
programme.desc: The competition begins when America's Next Top Model finalists Arrive in New York City.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Wants It So Bad

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Is Here To Win, Not Make Friends
programme.desc: The second model is eliminated after extreme runway and sexy photo shoot competitions.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Is Here To Win, Not Make Friends

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy. / Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.
programme.sub-title: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Figure Drawing / Date Bait
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes. / The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap
programme.desc: Beavis starts mimicing Butt-Head / A quiet day in Highland, Texas / Our duo enrolls in a fitness class
programme.sub-title: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Scared Straight / Citizen Butt-head Part 2
programme.desc: To teach them that crime doesn't pay, Beavis & Butt-head's principal sends them to prison for a day. Bad idea. / Beavis & Butt-head and President Clinton explore chaos theory together.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sporting goods / Cow tipping
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head decide to get athletic gear supporters for gym class / The duo venture out on a quest for cow tipping

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den rare jenta / Tidsreisen
programme.desc: Beavis møter en hemmelig beundrer på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head krysser frem og tilbake over delstatslinjen inn i Mountain Time Zone og tror de kan reise i tiden.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Manners Suck / Pipe Of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher. / Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nyren / Den gode handling
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis ødelegger nyren og en donor fra hans fortid redder dagen./ Beavis og Butt-Head utfører sin første gode gjerning ved å ha DDT i bowlen på skoledansen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head miss the schoolbus home / The duo makes a Late Night Show / Beavis and Butt-Head are invited to play football
programme.sub-title: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Tak / Elv
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head blir sittende fast på taket av Tom Andersons hus./ Beavis og Butt-Head seiler på dekk i en elv og ender opp på sjøen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Choke / Career day
programme.desc: Eating chicken can be hazardous / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support
programme.desc: After the Manager explains that Workers Compensation pays you for getting injured on the job, Butt-head sets out to injure Beavis / A Vampire craze hits the high school / Beavis and Butt-Head misinterpret what it means to ask a man for his daughter's hand
programme.sub-title: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Killing Time / Dude, a Reward
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV. / Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Teen Talk / vs.the Vending Machine
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems. / The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Fluktrommet/Den viktige
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å løse Fluktromgåten, bare for å bli fanget på badet. / Beavis møter sin største helt - Ild.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Snille Butt-Head/ Hjemmehjelp
programme.desc: Butt-Head får medisin for sin aggresjon mot Beavis og blir litt for snill./ Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head går tom for ølpenger, så Beavis må finne seg en jobb.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies
programme.desc: Our duo find out that accidents can lead to money / Beavis and Butt-Head get annoyed at a fly / After a beating by Todd, they become best friends over beer
programme.sub-title: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Virtuelt vannvidd / Utestengt
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head tar på seg solbriller og tror de er virtual reality-briller./ Beavis og Butt-Head blir låst ute av huset og ødelegger det når de prøver å komme seg inn.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Cyber-Butt / Citizens arrest / Pierced
programme.desc: The school PC gets internet and Stewart helps out friends surf the net / An armed robbery has hilarious consequence / Beavis and Butt-Head get beaten up and inspired to get their ears pierced

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bus trip / Green thumbs
programme.desc: The class goes on a roadtrip / Beavis and Butt dabble into counterfeit money using a photocopier

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Meet God
programme.desc: Innocent, naive yougsters Beavis & Butt-head are drawn into an insidious religious cult.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: 1-900-BEAVIS / Water Safety
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to start their own phone service / Beavis and Butt-head learn CPR from Mr. Buzzcut

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation
programme.desc: The duo goes to rock concert / Beavis and Butt-Head breaks into Stewarts house to watch TV / A bomb threat is called into their high school
programme.sub-title: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Friday Night / Tornado
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head spend Friday night at the local convenience store. / Beavis & Butt-head in their own mini-disaster movie with new friends Lolita and Tanqueray.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests. / Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.
programme.sub-title: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den nye fienden / Dobbelgjengeren
programme.desc: Vaskebjørner stjeler Beavis og Butt-Heads nachos, og guttene slår tilbake./ Beavis forveksler en fremmed med Butthead, og kan ikke bli kvitt ham.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Bokset inne / Birøktere
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head fanges i en pappeske mens de prøver å gjemme seg på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å sanke honning fra et vepsebol.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak
programme.sub-title: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bathroom Break / The Rat
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head decide to devote as much of their time at work as possible to bathroom breaks. / A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? A rat takes up residence and they stop at nothing.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Time to Push
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit; Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship; stress increases on makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Big Surprises
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up; uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show approach; two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Intervention
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko; Kitty Carter rocks some of the candidate's worlds; cameos give Kelli and Judy a fresh perspective on the girls; at Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Rehearsals with the Stars
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp comes to an end; Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake; Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Squad announcement feels bittersweet as some favorites go home; the team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting; Game Day arrives.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Judge's Showcase
programme.desc: Lagets største og mest talentfulle klassen på treningsleiren må imponere DCC-dommerne med soloer og gruppedans for å få være med. Melissa Rycroft er også med.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: You Came To Play!
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft kommer til første øvelse for å lete etter artistmentorer. Så rusker Brittany Perry-Russell opp i kandidatene med koreografien sin.. Med Melissa Rycroft og Brittany Perry-Russell.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Call the Medic!
programme.desc: Kandidatene får lære teknikker så sparkene blir ennå høyere. Kelli blir urolig for en kandidat da Evan Miller underviser i hurtigkoreografi. Med Melissa Page og Evan Miller.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Et sosialt medie-dilemma
programme.desc: Denise DiCharry underviser i koreografi på høyt nivå for å se hvilke som lærer raskt. Kelli blir bedre kjent med de ferske kandidatene under uniformsprøvene. Kommer et upassende innlegg i sosiale medier til å føre til at en av jentene blir avstengt?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Stomp The Roach!
programme.desc: Judy lærer ut DCC-entreen og kandidatene må ta splitthopp for første gang, ikke alle like vellykkede. En øvelse for nybegynnere avslører de svakere kandidatene..

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Turn Them Out
programme.desc: Criscilla Anderson underviser i L.A.-koreografi og noen får en dyrekjøpt livserfaring. Travis Wall er koreograf og har vunnet Emmy, og kommer for å hjelpe Kelli og Judy med noen vanskelige avgjørelser.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Show Group Showdown
programme.desc: DCC-kandidatenes opptaksprøve for ettertraktede stillinger i elitegruppen. Visse kandidater ligger dårlig an da 5 til skal bort av de 36 beste.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: I've Heard Rumors...
programme.desc: Etter en effektiv forvandling, har både Kelli og Juy viktige beskjeder. En veteran tar plutselig et følelsesladd farvel.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: You Are Wasting Our Time!
programme.desc: En veterans sjokkerende sorti gjør at Kelli og Judy må fatte sesongens tøfefste avgjørelse.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Everyone Needs A Dream
programme.desc: Det endelige, fulle laget offentliggjøres og Kelli tar det til kampdagens press. Inludert en helt ny opptreden.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: Over 600 spente og nervøse Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-aspiranter ankommer Texas Stadium for det første uttaket. Når de har danset for dommerne, venter de spent på å få høre hvem som går videre.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: I sluttuttaket er konkurransen beinhard. Nå må de som har overlevd, konkurrere mot erfarne veteraner om en av de ettertraktede plassene på DCCs treningsleir.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: Treningsleiren er i gang! De nye kandidatene er spente, og kanskje fulle av beundring, når de treffer veteranene for første gang på Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: Etter bare to uker på treningsleiren må noen elimineres. Men først skal jentene prøve draktene. Det er et bittersøtt øyeblikk for nykommerne siden de ennå ikke har gjort seg fortjent til dem.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: Etter å ha tatt farvel med en av sine egne, forstår de resterende treningsleir-kandidatene at ingens posisjon på troppen er sikker. Kitty Carter blir bedt om å jobbe med de svakeste jentene og piske dem i form.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hele troppen trenger en oppvekker og det skal de få av gjestekoreograf Kitty Carter. Hun leder gruppen gjennom en knallhard danseøvelse som gjør noen av jentene til emosjonelle vrak. Så er det tid for en leksjon i DCCs etikette.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Noen drømmer går i oppfyllelse når de gjenværende heldige treningsleir-kandidatene står modell i den ikoniske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-drakten under en sexy fotoseanse.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Flere kan miste plassen på laget, og det er bare to øvelser igjen. Jentene drar på seg de berømte hvite cowboy-støvlene for første gang. Så skal Judy og Megan Fox bedømme deres endelige danserutiner.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 18
programme.desc: Registrar Doctor Gemma Hartshorne prepares to treat a man who has suddenly lost all feeling in his foot. Loss of blood flow is turning Roger's foot white - urgent treatment is needed to prevent amputation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 19
programme.desc: Trainee Advanced Nurse Practitioner Chantelle Proctor assesses a 49-year-old man rushed in by ambulance. Philip, who has a heart condition, collapsed at home and has been vomiting for the last ten days.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 20
programme.desc: While people enjoy a most wonderful time of the year, Barnsley Hospital Casualty is open for business as usual, and the team are getting into the Christmas spirit. Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey is leading the festive shift.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: While Sister Jane runs outside to help a critical patient in the car park, Matron Val and Consultant Doctor Dave Walker need to negotiate with the Police who are stopping new arrivals entering the building.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Junior Doctor Tom Fish’s first patient is 18-year-old Lewis who has broken bones and deep wounds from a moped accident - but causing him the most pain is his fear of needles.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Sister Benita is running the shift, when suddenly, a fire alarm goes off and she must prepare the entire department - staff and emergency patients - for a full evacuation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: Sister Harriet spots Terry waiting in the queue and decides he needs urgent care. He’s fallen off a roof and is unable to move his arm from a position above his head.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: Priority is being given to two patients fighting for breath: 72-year-old Lynda and 2-year-old Seb. Junior Doctor Emma Faragher is treating Lynda. ‘Not being able to breathe is absolutely terrifying,’ says Doctor Faragher.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey looks after a 76-year-old woman who has come in after a nasty fall. She has broken her nose but Doctor Humphrey fears that bleeding on the brain could have much more serious long-term consequences.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: Doctor Carson’s caseload also includes Wayne, who was found with head injuries at the bottom of a flight of stairs, and 4-year-old Pippa who’s been brought in with severe sickness.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: As winter hits, the cold weather causes a spike in admissions at Barnsley Hospital. And for the casualty team those no letup in the blue light arrivals. Carole is rushed in after being found collapsed outside her home.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: It’s all change at Barnsley Casualty as a new system is introduced. Sister Benita is taking on the role of Team Leader for the first time, ‘Being in charge is nice,’ says Benita.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 10
programme.desc: The department is full and waiting time to see a doctor has doubled but ambulances are still bringing in critically ill patients.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: Nurse Chloe treats 88-year-old Enid, who has been knocked over by high-speed winds and has a severe open head wound. She needs to assess Enid quickly in case she’s suffered from a head trauma.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Consultant Doctor Chris Young meets his first patient of the day, 76-year-old Mavis, who is in a critical condition having been hit by a car. She has potential life-threatening injuries all over her body, so the team work quickly to assess the damage.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Last year, 1 in 7 NHS workers were physically abused and today is no different as much-loved health Care assistant Kerry is physically attacked by a patient she was trying to help.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: 70-year-old Fred is blue-lighted in having suffered a serious fall at home. With a shortage of doctors in the department, he’s taken straight for an urgent x-ray after which he’s transferred to the care of Dr Tom Hawthorne.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: The flow of patients at Barnsley Casualty is relentless and today staff are put under even more pressure by patients suffering from the effects of drink or drugs but all need the care of doctors and nurses - whatever their issues.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: When a key member of staff calls in sick at the last minute, Sister Rachael’s dream of smooth shift disappears. She must manage a department overflowing with patients, struggling with staff shortages, with longer waiting times and no available beds.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Sue from Oxford whose house is overflowing with possessions. Sue married the love of her life in 2015, and he moved in, bringing everything he owned with him.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 11
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Joanna from Birmingham, whose 2-bedroom flat is overflowing with possessions. Joanna works two jobs, leaving her no time to look after her home.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the picturesque city of Bath, Paul’s cottage is bursting at the seams with a lifetime’s collection of junk. Known locally as ‘boot cottage’ - because everything Paul owns and wears comes from car boot sales - every room is a no-go zone.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: In Harlow, 63-year-old Bubbles’ high-rise flat is packed with piles of junk she can’t bear to throw away. But it doesn’t end there she also has a staggering 4 lock ups stuffed to the gills with rubbish.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In Mansfield Sue’s hoard is driving her family and grandchildren away and her husband Neil to distraction. Every room is crammed with clutter including a bedroom that looks more like a dolls graveyard than somewhere to sleep.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Liverpool, the Bells are a family at war over hoarding. Mum Betty and son Richard are happy to live in their mess, but son in law Keith is determined that things must change. Can they change the habit of a lifetime and part with their possessions?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: In the London suburb of Enfield, former workaholic Sandra has become a hoard-aholic since retiring. Her compulsion to spend is out of control, and everything is added to the growing mountains of books, clothes and candles…

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of American born dog loving Dani from Shepton Mallet who moved to the UK with high hopes of living the English Country dream, but bad health got the better of her.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 7
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Eco warrior Karen from Somerset, who after many years of living off grid in a caravan, has struggled to adapt to living in, and looking after, a house.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 8
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Pippa and Matt from Oxford who have 6 kids all living in a 3-bedroom house. With both parents working full time, the house has taken a back seat for many years.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 6
programme.desc: In South Wales, 49-year-old Alison has always been a hoarder. What started as a passion for teddy bears has transformed into an obsession for. She currently has 11 and they rule the house, at least the bits they can get to in between the hoard…

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 8
programme.desc: 79-year-old Joyce moved into her dream home in Liverpool nearly 40 years ago with her partner, Norman. But when he passed away, she lost her battle to keep on top of the hoarding behavior she inherited from her mum.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 9
programme.desc: What happens when a hoarder can no longer live safely in their home and the family are left to pick up the pieces? House clearance experts Ange and Yvonne have been called in by the daughters of a lifelong hoarder to clear their dad’s house.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode we meet 63-year-old Jane, a retired nurse from Southeast London. Jane’s inability to start a family brought on her hoarding tendencies and 27 years later, her 2 bedroomed terrace home is full to the rafters with furniture and books.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this brand-new series of Dirty Home Rescue, Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Toni from Telford whose house is so dirty her partner of 10 years, Rich, won’t move in with her.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 2
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Bill and Antionette from Newport, who share their home with their 3 cats. They admit they’ve not deep cleaned their home since they moved in.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 3
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of married couple Lynne and Keith from Chudleigh in South Devon whose house hasn’t had a deep clean since they moved in nearly 20 years ago.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: From the outside 69-year-old Barbara’s house in Braintree looks like any other on the street, but she wasn’t always a hoarder, as the tragic deaths of her husband and son sent her life spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is on his way to a risky roadside rescue. A 38-tonne mail lorry has taken door step delivery to another level by crashing on a London street.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: There's a tricky situation for Recovery Operator Stephen in Warwickshire after an overnight frost makes a narrow country lane as slippery as an ice rink, causing a road sweeper to slide into a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: It's 4.30am and as Britain's network of roads and motorway stir the team at Lantern gear up for a huge emergency call out. An 18-wheel trailer carrying two portacabins has caught fire closing 3 lanes of the eastbound carriageway of the M25.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Lantern Recovery Op, Merrie faces a dangerous challenge when a twenty-ton drinks lorry gets grounded on a boggy verge. The truck is stuck fast and initial attempts to pull it free leave the lorry leaning over and threatening to topple on its side.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, Sean is in a race against time to shift a tractor unit and trailer fully laden with 27 tonnes of wood, after it left a busy section of road and toppled over into a muddy ditch alongside a row of bushes.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire Recovery Operator Jay hopes he won't have sleepless nights over an Artic stacked full of bed frames and mattresses which has careered off a busy A road into a dry-stone wall and is lying in a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: Around the UK a 16-meter lorry loaded with waste flips over near a busy roundabout, a fully loaded bin lorry suffers a rear axle failure in the middle of its rubbish round and a double-height car transporter piled high with vehicles needs rescuing.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: Lantern op Stuart is at a rollover, it's going to be a massive job. Crouch's Mark has a bridge strike, he needs to hurry, the police are already on scene. Lantern's Merrie is called to collect a small truck and gets more than she bargained for!

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Crouch Incident manager Steve Kelly and his team have been called out to a lorry that has caught fire on the extremely busy A1. By the time Steve arrives the fire has been put out and Callum has pulled the tractor unit onto a low loader.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Lantern recovery op Stuart is called out to assist in the rescue of a rollover. On arrival he finds an artic carrying at least 1,500 boxes of A4 paper has tipped over on a busy roundabout

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: Steve Kelly and his team have been called out to an artic that caught fire on the M6 and now needs to be removed from the motorway. When Steve arrives, the tractor unit has already been taken away, but the double decker trailer has been badly damaged.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: An artic loaded with gas canisters has slid down the embankment, it will be an epic challenge for 3 of Lantern's most experienced operatives. In the East Midlands Troy has been sent to save a truck that has broken down on a busy single carriageway.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alpha Recovery joins the team as Op Kev is tasked with rescuing a 45-tonne mobile crane. In London, Merrie rescues a truck on a narrow road between train lines. Abang performs a risky rescue of a van and trailer. We catch up with ex-driver Rory.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: In the North East at Alpha Recovery, Kevin is faced with a real challenge. Crouch driver Abang has to save a sportscar that's gone off the road. Lanterns Merrie has a surprise for a Trucking Hell superfan and Aidan is faced with a busted bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: An Artic has come off the carriageway so Crouch sends in the big hitters. Alpha's Aidan is with a bus which has stopped near a school. Merrie must risk life and limb to rescue a coach and Lantern op Sean dices with death on a notorious road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: On the Moors, a 50 ton construction machine has landed in a stream. The team at Alpha faces a dangerous two-day rescue. On The M1, Lantern's Bohdan rescues a stranded 44-ton artic and Stuart is called to the A34 to rescue a broken-down bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: On a remote track in the Yorkshire Dales, Kev and his fellow Alpha recovery ops are in the midst of one of their toughest rescue missions in years.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: On the busy A1 halfway between Newcastle and Durham an artic has veered into a 6-foot Armco roadside barrier, propelling it into the air and down a 20-metre embankment.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire Lantern Recovery op Sean has been sent to tackle a telehandler that's flipped over in the back of a very muddy garden. To make matters worse, the boom arm is extended and there are trees covering the site.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: On the M25 near Enfield two lorries, two cars, and a Transit have piled into each other blocking three of four lanes. In a ten-mile tailback, the Lantern team must recover the two artics.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 201
programme.desc: En augustdag i 1996 blir den 20 år gamle hotellarbeideren Trude Espås observert sittende på en stein ikke langt unna Geiranger sentrum. 11 dager senere blir hun funnet drept.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 104
programme.desc: 10. august 2019 opplevde Norge nok et rystende terrorangrep. 21 år gamle Philip Manshaus dreper først sin 17 år gamle stesøster. Bevæpnet, og med uniform går han deretter til angrep mot Al-Noor moskeen i Bærum.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 101
programme.desc: Anne Elisabeth Hagen forsvinner sporløst fra sitt hjem høsten 2018. På en rød stol finner ektemann og milliardær, Tom Hagen et trusselbrev og krav om løsepenger.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Den 15. mai 2018 ble politiet i Örebro varslet om at Lena Wesström, en trebarnsmor, var forsvunnet fra hjemmet sitt. Et vitne hevder å ha hørt hjerteskjærende skrik fra en kvinne samme natt som Lena forsvant.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 202
programme.desc: Tidlig en søndag morgen i 2004 er den 22 år gamle sykepleierstudenten Anne Slåtten på vei til jobb, men hun dukker aldri opp. Etter et døgn blir hun funnet drept i. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av den omsorgsfulle jenta?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 501
programme.desc: Gjenopptakelseskommisjonen har siden 2018 vurdert om Norges mest kjente drapssak skal etterforskes på ny. Skal det endelig lykkes Per og Veronica Orderud å få gjenopptatt saken?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 605
programme.desc: Den 12. juni 2017 blir et eldre par funnet brutalt drept på deres gård utenfor Mantorp. Viktige brikker i puslespillet i jakten på morderen viser seg å være teiprester, så vel som usedvanlig store skoavtrykk.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 302
programme.desc: I september 2003 blir en gutt seksuelt misbrukt av en mann i trappeoppgangen der han bor. Politiet starter en intens jakt på mannens identitet for å få stoppet ham. Samtidig kommer det stadig inn nye meldinger om overgrep.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 402
programme.desc: En sommerdag i 1999 sykler tolv år gamle Kristin Juel Johannessen hjemmefra på vei til badestranda. Samme kveld blir hun meldt savnet. Hvor har den unge jenta tatt veien?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 705
programme.desc: Psykolog Helena Bering forsvinner sporløst midt på dagen den 18. august 2004. Hun har nettopp avsluttet et møte med en klient på klinikken i Stockholm, når alle spor etter henne forsvinner.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 503
programme.desc: I 2007 kommer en mann og hans mor inn på politistasjonen i Bergen for å underrette om at hans kone, Dung Tran Larsen, har vært savnet i en uke. Hva skjedde egentlig med Dung?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 303
programme.desc: Tidlig på 90-tallet rystes den norske befolkningen av flere kirkebranner. I 1993 blir Øystein Aarseth funnet død i en trappeoppgang i Oslo. Politiet retter søkelyset mot enkelte personer i black-metal-miljøet. En av disse er Varg Vikernes.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 401
programme.desc: I mai 1995 blir 17 år gamle Birgitte Tengs funnet drept bare noen få hundre meter unna sitt hjem i Kopervik på Karmøy. Saken fører til omfattende etterforskning, og Birgittes fetter havner raskt i søkelyset.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 703
programme.desc: 18 år gamle Ndella Jack har nettopp kommet hjem fra bryllupsreise med mannen sin. Det som skulle være starten på deres liv sammen, får i stedet en brå slutt, da de blir ofre for et brutalt angrep.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 606
programme.desc: Den siste gangen Fatima Berggren ble sett i live var på hennes 57-årsdag i mai 2017. Saken blir først betraktet som en kidnapping, men uten livstegn fra Fatima, anser politiet det snart som en drapssak.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 602
programme.desc: En regnfull morgen den 19. oktober 2004 dreper en ukjent mann en åtte år gammel gutt og en 56 år gammel kvinne i Linköping. Gjerningsmannen forsvinner sporløst og politiet må nå finne ut hvem han er.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 205
programme.desc: Etter meldinger om et rykende bål i Hafjell går drapsalarmen hos politiet på Lillehammer. På bålet viser det seg å ligge rester av et partert menneske. Samtidig meldes to personer savnet fra en bolig i nærheten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305
programme.desc: 19. desember 1994 setter Bjørn Thore Langemyhr seg på et tog fra Tønsberg til Oslo. Det er det siste familien ser til ham. Samtidig begynner ryktene å gå om at et belastet rusmiljø kan ha tatt livet av Langemyhr.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Coach & Sueki
programme.desc: Coach, an out of control Boxer, bit a neighbor, seemingly sealing his fate. Coach gets a stay of execution when Cesar Millan comes to the rescue. Sueki refuses to walk on the leash.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Slick & Pepper
programme.desc: Slick, a rare white Puli, is full of phobias. When clients come to Christopher’s photography studio, they are greeted by Pepper’s annoying barking and heel nipping.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Ava & Gus
programme.desc: Ava, a Pug/Pekingese swiftly twirls for all occasions, possibly a neurological condition Cesar cannot treat. Gus the Bouvier greets people by throwing his 100 pound body at them.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Maya & Churchill
programme.desc: Churchill the Rottweiler is a well mannered dog, except when around other animals. Meanwhile, Maya, an affable Pit Bull, insists on being intimately involved in all operations of the household.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bubba & Garrett
programme.desc: Heidi Wasserman inherited Bubba, a spoiled Maltese that demands to be taken everywhere and nips at anyone who tries to leave. Garrett, a German Shepherd, chases his tail, obsessively.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Emily
programme.desc: Emily, a Pit Bull, has become every owner’s worst nightmare – extremely aggressive towards other dogs. She’s so out of control, only Cesar Millan’s 6-week boot camp can turn her behavior around.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Hank & Paris
programme.desc: Marsha Alexander’s rescued Mastiff has ruined the furniture and intimidates anyone walking by his gate. Paris, a long hair Chihuahua, looks fashionable, but barks and snaps at strangers.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sasha & Shep
programme.desc: Lhasa Apso Sasha, bares her teeth at anyone who takes anything from her. White German Shepherd, “Shep,” goes after strangers, making it impossible for his wheelchair bound owner to control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jake & King
programme.desc: Jake tends to mind his owner Bob but goes crazy to protect Bob’s wife Linda. At the same time, all of 10 year old Chantel’s might is hardly enough for 150 pound King to even take notice.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Scrawny & Lola
programme.desc: Scrawny, one of nine Yorkies, is Allen’s favorite, but attacks anyone that comes near. Lola, a Dalmatian, barks at everything. Find out how Cesar reestablishes control in both homes.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: J & Alice
programme.desc: J is unpredictable and aggressive and his owner is now dealing with a lawsuit. Alice is depressed and aggressive towards the other two dogs in the house – a potentially lethal combination.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Caper & Julius
programme.desc: Caper has a lot of energy, particularly when it comes to chasing down balls non-stop. Julius is a four-year-old Pit Bull mix that is frightened of everything.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bella & Jordan
programme.desc: “Bella Angel” is a devil in disguise. She bites anyone who comes near the house or the family. Jordan, an English Bulldog, jumps up and down, licks people incessantly and is obsessed by skateboards.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sunshine & Teddy
programme.desc: Sunshine is a champion Doberman in the show ring but far too aggressive in the street. Teddy, a yellow lab, has bitten its owner twice, and has attacked more than one stranger.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Goldie & Pepsi
programme.desc: Pepsi, a German Shepherd, becomes intensely aggressive around cats. Goldie, the beautiful Brittany Spaniel of “General Hospital” star Jacklyn Zeman that has become aggressive towards female dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Nicki
programme.desc: Nicky, a 4-year old black Rottweiler, suffered terribly in his youth. His new owner has given him a loving home. However, there are a few old habits he can’t shake, including dog aggression.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Percy & Justice
programme.desc: Percy, a West Highland White Terrier, is a handful, biting anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters. Justice, a Pit Bull, is slowly escalating toward dangerous aggression.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Stewart & Buddy
programme.desc: Stewart, a Chow/Golden Retriever mix, barks and growls at and seems to be fearful and aggressive toward children. Every time Johnny turns on the hose, Buddy the Beagle runs for the house.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lucy & Lizzie
programme.desc: Lucy the Dalmatian snarls at larger dogs then turns in circles and attacks her own tail. Lizzie, a Red Tick Elizabethan Beagle, is obsessed with running, inside or outside.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sophie & Daisy
programme.desc: Sophie, a Sheltie-Golden nix, tries to nip at the heels of her owner’s horse. Daisy has an annoying problem – she tries to “hump” various members of the Benda family.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Boyfriend & Alfie
programme.desc: “Boyfriend” is a Shephard mix that has repeatedly bitten his owner’s boyfriend. Alfie is the aggressive English Bulldog of popular actress/television host Daisy Fuentes.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Brady, Bandit, and Hootie
programme.desc: Water-obsessed Labrador; a pooch with performance anxiety; a leg chomping Chihuahua.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sonny, Cinnamon & Chocolate, and Boo
programme.desc: Pug and pet pig get rowdy; emotionally scarred Shepherd; two Dachshunds make an unsavory mix.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy, Teddy, and Matilda
programme.desc: Lab/Staffordshire mix unfriendly to small animals; a poodle that can't stop running in circles; bulldog obsessed with attaching skateboard wheels.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jonbee, Hudson & Violet, and Buford
programme.desc: A ferocious stray Jindo in desperate need of rescue, a Great Dane wreaks havoc on house and home, a boxer mourns the death of a beloved mate.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs
programme.desc: Traumatized canine victims of Hurricane Katrina are rehabilitated; a couple's dogs finally meet; a big dog's dangerous appetite for toys, towels and trampolines.
programme.sub-title: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy, Tiger & Roxy, and Booker
programme.desc: Cesar tries to rehabilitate two Rottie pups before they grow into dangerous attack dogs. Buddy, has a bad habit of biting. A Visla cowers and cringes at the sights and sounds of the city.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Glødhet katolsk kjærlighet
programme.desc: Presten Maxi reiser til Roma da skandalen i den katolske kirken truer med å påvirke antallet kirkegjengere i South Park negativt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Den skumle fisken
programme.desc: Sharon Marshs tante Flo har gaver til Shelly og Stan. Shelly får et flott stereoanlegg, mens Stan får en skummel fisk.

programme.title: South Park: Succubusen
programme.desc: Cartman går til optiker, som gjør narr av Cartmans vektproblemer og kaller ham 'Piggy'.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: Da Wall-Mart kom til byen
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle prøver å forhindre at Wall-Mart forvandler South Park til en spøkelsesby, men en besatt Cartman står i deres vei.

programme.title: South Park: Fåraktig
programme.desc: Mens han er på en gruppeterapitime mot hamstring, blir Stan fanget i en drøm om skolerådgiveren Mr. Mackey.

programme.title: South Park: Gothbarn 3: posørenes daggry
programme.desc: Goth-ungene sendes på leir for problembarn.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium er ikke gratis
programme.desc: Stan blir avhengig av det nye mobilspillet med Terrance og Phillip.

programme.title: South Park: Heksesønner
programme.desc: På den årlige Halloween-sammenkomsten, kaster en heks trolldom som terroriserer alle i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Råtne tomater
programme.desc: Barna i South Park påstår at de har sett mr. Garrison luske rundt i byen. Folk i byen er sinte fordi presidenten skremmer barna deres.

programme.title: South Park: Sparkesyklene
programme.desc: Ungene planlegger å bruke siste nytt innen forflytning for å skaffe seg mer godteri til halloween enn de har fått noen gang.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms Halloween Special
programme.desc: Det er Halloween og Randy må forholde seg til datterens marihuanaproblem.

programme.title: South Park: Øyekatarr
programme.desc: Det er Halloween i South Park, og Kenny blir drept av en styrtende romstasjon og forvandlet til en zombie, ved hjelp av balsameringsvæske og Worcestersaus.

programme.title: South Park: Universets største drittsekk
programme.desc: Cartman føler seg ikke bra etter å ha drukket Kennys aske og blitt besatt av sjelen hans, og sendes til sykehuset.

programme.title: South Park: Helvete på jord 2006
programme.desc: Det er halloween, og Satan holder verdens største kostymefest.

programme.title: South Park: De levende hjemløses natt
programme.desc: Uteliggere oversvømmer South Park, og guttene legger en lur plan for å flytte dem til en annen by, mens de voksne får panikk.

programme.title: South Park: Den ustoppelige
programme.desc: Evig uskyldige Butters er lei behandlingen han får av foreldrene, og blir litt for oppslukt av den nye vampyrfeberen.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Zimmermans verdenskrig
programme.desc: Cartman anser Token for å være en trussel mot hele menneskeheten.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Glødhet katolsk kjærlighet
programme.desc: Presten Maxi reiser til Roma da skandalen i den katolske kirken truer med å påvirke antallet kirkegjengere i South Park negativt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Den skumle fisken
programme.desc: Sharon Marshs tante Flo har gaver til Shelly og Stan. Shelly får et flott stereoanlegg, mens Stan får en skummel fisk.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Shades of Grey

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Promises of Someday

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dead of Winter

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Sticks and Stones

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Take My Life... Please!/Devil's Alphabet/The Library

programme.sub-title: Take My Life... Please!/Devil's Alphabet/The Library

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play/Grace Note
programme.desc: A condemned man, Adam Grant, insists that everything and everyone around him is a dream: one that he can't wake up from/An aspiring opera singer gets an inspiring glimpse of her future, courtesy of a dying wish by her youngest sister.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Howling Man
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nick of Time
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Lateness of the Hour
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A day in Beaumont/The Last Defender of Camelot
programme.desc: In the 1950s a flying saucer crashes on Earth. The crash is seen by a couple but no one believes them/Sir Lancelot seeks the help of the sleeping Merlin in one final battle. But he soon finds himself facing off against the revived wizard.
programme.sub-title: A day in Beaumont/The Last Defender of Camelot

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: After Hours/Lost and Found
programme.desc: Marsha Cole detects shadowy figures and mysterious voices around her during a trip to a local shopping mall/College student Jennifer Templeton finds out why her possessions have been vanishing.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Saucer of Loneliness
programme.desc: A quiet waitress sees a glowing UFO, which gives her a message that everyone wants to know. She refuses to reveal exactly what the message is.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trouble with Templeton
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Most Unusual Camera

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Night of the Meek
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag, he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dust
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Toys of Caliban

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Whole Truth

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Invaders

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: A man who dodged the Vietnam draft sees how life would have been like if he hadn't

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Card
programme.desc: A compulsive spender accepts "The Card" to keep up her habit. Unfortunately stringent penalties kick in for late payments.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shelter Skelter
programme.desc: A survivalist traps himself in his bomb shelter when a nuclear blast finally comes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Junction

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Twenty-Two

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Odyssey of Flight 33

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Dingle, the Strong

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Static

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Joy Ride/Private Channel

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
