programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gjenforening, andre del
programme.desc: I andre del av gjenforeningen av Jersey Shore familieferie, finner Justina Valentine sesongens mest dramatiske scener.. Hva er status for Angelina og Vinny 2.0? Hva er Nicoles neste skritt i slekthistoriereisen? En uvelkommen gjest sjokkerer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: RSVP drar til New Yorks største italienske festival San Gennaro's Feast for å hjelpe Vinny å finne kjærligheten. Ang vil bli popstjerne. Nicole får mer informasjon om sin biologiske mor.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Løper...for pizza
programme.desc: Gutta drar til Connecticut for å se Vinnys første standupshow. Deena tar seg en pizza. Sammi og Ronnie snakker endelig sammen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Romkameratene samles for å lege gamle sår. Ang endrer mening.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Vinny tror han har feber. Jentene tar privatjet for å se Pauly spinne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Tur til bondegården
programme.desc: Angelina snakker med spøkelser. Mike setter alle i arbeid.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Eggcellent
programme.desc: Etter en dag med ærlig 'arbeid' på bondegården, får gjengen oppleve fra jord til bord.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Lage Barn-Cologne
programme.desc: Gjengen fester i Atlantic City på Halloween. Pauly planlegger en stor overraskelse for Nikki.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni har sin regissørdebut. Gjengen gjør seg klar til sin første internasjonale familiferie på mange år.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly og Nikki drar til Jamaica en dag tidligere for å feire årsdagen sin. Mike har en overraskelse til det lykkelige paret.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly og Nikki leker Kirsten Giftekniv for Vinny. Snooki og Sammi ankommer Jamaica.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Guido-bobsledelag
programme.desc: Gjengen tar seg en heisatur. Vinny slår til.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Last Shot at Love' med Vinny G
programme.desc: New Yorks mest kvalifiserte ungkar søker kjærligheten i sitt eget datingshow.
programme.sub-title: Last Shot at Love' med Vinny G

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Come on Eileen
programme.desc: Gjengen omfavner Jamaicas vakre fossefall og lokale kjøkken. Vinny omfavner Ailin.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Angelinas hevn
programme.desc: Lauren og Mike planlegger forlovelsesfest for Sammi. Onkel Nino ankommer Jamaica.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: 1209 Ocean Terrace
programme.desc: Gjengen planlegger sitt 15-årsjubileum. Ronnie og Sammi gjenforenes i strandhuset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Gjengen (egentlig Danny) omvandler Shore Store til en stor prisgalla når de feirer 15 år sammen! Kjøttbollene foreslår at de skal finne kjærligheten til Vinnys mamma.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 1
programme.desc: Gjengen gjenforenes for å feire 15 år med kaos og ikoniske øyeblikk. Fra Cape Mays spøkelsesjakt til Nicoles familebakgrunnsreise. Første del viser overraskelser, favorittminner og det store spørsmålet: er Sammi og Ronnie klare til å skvære opp?
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 1

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Gjenforeningen fortsetter med sol, skygge og sjokkøyeblikk. Gjengen opplever drama og moro på Jamaica. Er Angelina og Lauren fortsatt låst i "småunge"-krangelen? Pluss favorittøyeblikk, overraskelsesgjester og latter i løpet av 15 år med strandliv.
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 2

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: What's in the Bag?
programme.desc: Etter fem år fra hverandre, skal våre favoritt-guidos gjenforenes i Miami under en familieferie, men The Situations juridiske problemer setter ferien hans i fare.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt finally moves out and Dad visits the hospital via the emergency room.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's post heart-attack zest for life is making everyone a little crazy.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric counsels a young man who feels his wife should be meek and subservient, while Annie and the girls rally for women's rights in Afghanistan.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt hates his job and tries to decide what to do with his life.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt refuses to help a classmate cheat, and gets in trouble anyway.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Aunt Julie goes into labor while visiting the Camdens, but there's no car or help to be found.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: In the first of this dramatic two-part episode, Mary lets her anger sway her judgement when the basketball coach imposes a lockout.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary faces the possibility of jail time in the conclusion of this dramatic two- part episode.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Just when Matt thought things were great with his girlfriend, she starts to withdraw from him.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's devastated when he finds out his girlfriend has been accepted to a college 3,000 miles away.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary's mad at Dad for standing in the middle of her blossoming relationship.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Annie takes off for a much-needed rest, but she can't escape the troubles that weigh down her soul.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When dad spies on his kids, he catches Lucy making out in public - with *N SYNC's Lance Bass!

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon befriends and defends a classmate with Tourette's Syndrome.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary's boyfriend is planning a very special Valentine's Day at a motel!

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon prays for a second chance, Ruthie prays for a pony, and Matt meets the girl he believes is the answer to his prayer.
programme.sub-title: Say a Little Prayer for Me

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric worries that a killer might go free, when he sits on a jury in a cop-killer trial.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary dreams about playing basketball for the Pros, while Matt decides to make his dreams come true in New York.

programme.title: Armor of God 2: Operation Condor NO
programme.desc: Eventyreren i Jackie Chans skikkelse er tilbake i en ny jakt etter en bortgjemt skatt, skjult i ørkenen av nazistene før andre verdenskrig. Men Jackie og kompanjongen hans Ada er ikke de eneste som leter etter skatten...

programme.title: Winners and Sinners NO
programme.desc: Fem gode venner blir løslatt fra fengsel, fast bestemt på å leve lovlydige liv fra nå av. Sammen starter de et rengjøringsfirma, og starten på deres nye liv er et faktum. Men samme dag løslates også en sjette fange som har en motsatt plan.

programme.title: The Young Master NO
programme.desc: Etter at Dragon har blitt bedratt av sin egen bror, Tiger, står de to som representanter for rivaliserende skoler i den årlige løvedansekonkurransen. Selv om Tiger vinner, blir han tvunget til eksil av skammen over å ha sveket sine egne.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars NO
programme.desc: Politimannen Muscle fra Hong Kong drar til Japan på jakt etter en korrupt kollega. Men siden yakuzaen allerede har opplysninger om ham, kan han ikke gjøre jobben på egen hånd. Etter hvert kaller de inn barndomsvennene til Muscle for å hjelpe til.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America NO
programme.desc: I en tid da mange kinesere ble solgt til amerikanske jernbaneselskaper som behandlet dem brutalt med tøffe arbeidsforhold, reiser Wong Fei-hung til Amerika. Men etter et bakholdsangrep blir han adskilt fra de andre han reiser med.

programme.title: The Canton Godfather NO
programme.desc: Wah vet knapt ordet av det før han har blitt fralurt pengene sine. Han legger de siste slantene på en rose fra en blomsterhandler som mener at blomstene hennes fører med seg lykke og velstand. Og riktig nok ser Wah snart at flaksen har snudd.

programme.title: Knockabout
programme.desc: De to brødre og småforbrydere Yipao og Taipao overtaler en kampsportsekspert til at tage dem som elever, helt uvidende om hans beskidte fortid. Denne film vises uden undertekster.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America NO
programme.desc: I en tid da mange kinesere ble solgt til amerikanske jernbaneselskaper som behandlet dem brutalt med tøffe arbeidsforhold, reiser Wong Fei-hung til Amerika. Men etter et bakholdsangrep blir han adskilt fra de andre han reiser med.

programme.title: Magnificent Bodyguards NO
programme.desc: En kung fu-kjempe blir leid inn for å lede livvaktene til en døende mann, og eskortere ham til legen. Men for å komme seg dit må de passere Stormy Hills-området, fullt av banditter, villmenn og onde munker.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker's patient, Jimmy, is a penniless scalper who is unable to afford his ulcer treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: On Jake's way out to meet his girlfriend, Becker warns him that his zipper is down.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker (Ted Danson) performs his doctorly duties at the diner when a woman begins to choke on her food.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to quit smoking and ends up exchanging one urge for another, sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda gets a Little Sister and learns a lesson about rebellion while John meddles in Reggies love life.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We learn more about Linda's upbringing and gain insight into her world after a series of mishaps which led her to quit her job. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie chases a high school fantasy, by reuniting with a high school crush who ends up being a jerk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has an extra ticket to Chicago and Reggie decides to go.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: A friend of and an old friend of Beckers is in town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker gets shot and Frances Fisher guest stars as his doctor. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Frances Fisher guest stars again as Dr. Elizabeth Carson and reveals to Becker her attraction to him

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and Liz realize that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff and Bob wins and loses to lottery tickets.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We find out how Jake becomes blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend, and himself. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts to appreciate life after spending an evening in the morgue identifying one of his patients.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker deals with chaos at work while Reggie studies for a test and Margaret attends the reading of a will. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts a secretive new health regime to lower his cholesterol, which leads people to talk about his unknown condition. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is arrested for being confrontational and forced to do community service and Bob moves in with Linda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker feels old after having to renew his driver's license.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker takes a stab at being social by having a dinner party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker fights over a phone bill, Reggie is angry over not being invited to a wedding and Bob gains too much confidence listening to self-help tapes. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker mistakenly tells the wrong family that their father has died, while Margaret and Linda deal with Linda's depressed friend Lynda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and Linda have jury duty and Jake gets a seeing-eye-dog. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake goes on a date with a blind girl and Margaret is confronted by the fact that one of her patients doesn't like her. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets into a passionate discussion about faith in the power of God versus medicine with a Priest and Jake, Reggie and Bob take a stab at the stock market.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie has a panic attack about where her life is going and Becker confesses that he misses Elizabeth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker assesses his feelings for Liz when she is offered a new job in Chicago and Linda breaks-up with Gil for lying to her. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's four attempts to watch the same movie are annoyingly interrupted, Reggie goes back to school and Hattie discovers her husband's infidelity. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is in an awkward situation when his building super is found dead of natural causes

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker had an ethical decision to make with one of his patients and Reggie is proposed to on her second date with a man. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is a mentor to a student and Reggie, Bob and Jake come to a standstill in their friendship. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is accused of being a creature of habit and as a result, tries a new restaurant.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker runs into an old flame and fights with his conscience to spend the night with her because she's a married woman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has made a resolution to quit smoking and he announces it to everyone at the diner.
programme.sub-title: Smoke em if You Got em

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Margaret has an erotic dream about John and Linda tries to analyze it. Reggie, Jake and Bob get drunk off a keg of beer. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has anxiety issues over dating a younger woman and Reggie is getting threats from an ex-convict. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Christmas turns Reggie into a competitive freak; Bob, a greedy super; Jake, a non-participant and John an Angry Head.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John inherits an urn with one of his old patients, Harry in it.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Aftermath
programme.desc: In WWII's final months, Allies discover Nazi death camps, prompting a sweeping denazification of Germany post-war. Nuremberg trials convict top Nazis. Former Nazis are employed by the West in the Cold War struggle against the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Today’s infantry demands a weapon combining machine gun firepower with rifle accuracy and mobility.. Host Wil Willis traces this journey through iconic firearms.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Special Forces operate deep behind enemy lines with top-of-the-line weapons.Host Wil Willis tests the Sig Sauer P226, the preferred choice like the Mark 25 by Navy SEALs, against competitors like the H&K Compact Tactical.

programme.title: Secret War: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece
programme.desc: Monty Woodhouse, a professor and a legend for blowing up the Gorgopotamos Bridge in Greece in 1942. In the British counter attack against Rommell at Al Alamein in North Africa it was vital to disrupt German supply routes, Greece.
programme.sub-title: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Seizing Power
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, Hitler capitalizes on economic woes blaming the Weimar Government and Jews. Despite scandals, Nazi rallies gain popularity and emerge as the largest party. Hitler becomes Chancellor in 1933, using the 'Enabling Act' to seize power.

programme.title: Secret War: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb
programme.desc: Sir Charles attended Eton, and then joined the Coldstream Guards. He won the Military Cross on the Western Front and, having survived the war, returned to banking.
programme.sub-title: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Frenzied Killing
programme.desc: Flere mennesker blir drept i 1944 enn noen gang før på Auschwitz. Nazistene prøver å så forvirring blant de allierte i øst, og de vestlige allierte tar beslutninger om å forhandle med nazistene om jødene og bombe leiren.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The activities of nations after World War I that lead to World War II.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Killer Police
programme.desc: In Ukraine and Lithuania, Nazi invaders were welcomed as liberators. In Lithuania, Antanas Gecas led a militia that executed hundreds of Jews. Ukrainian nationalists participated in pogroms slaughtering 34,000 Jews in two days.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Gatling Gun, designed to change 19th-century battlefields, now reigns supreme in the skies as a high-speed offensive weapon. With a 150-year legacy of havoc it continues to be a formidable force.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Corruption
programme.desc: I 1943 er korrupsjonen løpsk på Auschwitz-Birkenau. Leiren får også en ny inntektskilde – klær og verdifulle eiendeler tatt fra jøder som kommer for å bli gasset.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: Operation Galia
programme.desc: Monty’s journey sees him follow the path 33 SAS soldiers took after they were parachuted behind enemy lines to attack the enemy and create chaos to draw Nazi-fascist forces away from the front line.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: Germany makes critical errors during the bombing of Britain.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: In 1945, Germany is crumbly on both fronts. The Western Allies cross the Rhine and take most of Germany, while the Red Army quickly advances into Berlin. After Hitler's suicide, Germany surrenders and is divided among the allied powers.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Becoming Respectable
programme.desc: In 1924, Hitler is convicted for High Treason after the failed Nazi power grab. In prison, he writes Mein Kampf, articulating his anti-Semitic and expansionist beliefs. Upon release, Hitler rebrands the Nazi Party.

programme.title: The Real Oppenheimer
programme.desc: I 1945 ble verden ført inn i atomalderen. Rollen hans som "Father of the Bomb" var satt , og Oppenheimer ble stadig mer bekymret for den potensielle faren denne vitenskapelige oppfinnelser kunne utgjøre for menneskeheten.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Jews Who Fought for Hitler
programme.desc: In Hitler’s Germany, those with Jewish ancestry faced harsh Nuremberg Laws. Full Jews faced death; Mischlinge endured discrimination, job bans. Some, like Helmut Schmidt, unaware of heritage, found protectors like Milch in high places.
programme.sub-title: The Jews Who Fought for Hitler

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the 90 minute season premiere 25 girls arrive at bootcamp and meet their host Elle Macpherson. They also come face to face with the other judges, fashion designer Julian MacDonald, stylist Grace Woodward and ex-male model Charley Speed.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the first week of the main competition, the final 14 move into their new model house and participate in a lingerie themed photo shoot. The girls then have their first official elimination of the main competition. One girl is sent home.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls receive their makeovers, but not all are happy with their new looks. The models are assigned a photoshoot wearing Links of London couture.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls meet Girls Aloud singer Nicola Roberts and take part in a photoshoot for Beat Bullying.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in a posing challenge on Carnaby Street then film a commercial for Beyonce's new fragrance 'Heat'. The photoshoot involves being covered in chocolate which proves difficult for one girl who shows up hungover.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Alesha Dixon meets the models and tasks them with selling her new jewelry line on live television. After meeting Grace in Gatwick airport they are given £500 to go on a shopping spree. They are then whisked off to Spain to do a photoshoot in swim wear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in an acting challenge on the Hollyoaks set and one girl gets carried away on a night out with some of the cast members. The girls must do a horror style photoshoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models face an icy photoshoot when they fly off to Norway.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: This week the girls do a beauty shoot for Revlon and some girls are pushed over the edge in a second shoot for 'Galaxy Ripple'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A challenge with Nicky Johnston sees one model facing harsh criticism. The girls then do a photoshoot with TV personality George Lamb and take part in a photoshoot with a London Rugby team for legendary photographer Terry O'Neill.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 5 arrive in Kuala Lumpar and meet with fashion legend Jimmy Choo to take part in a dance challenge. The photoshoot this week takes place at night for Baby G watches.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 4 are sent on go-sees around Kuala Lumpar and are sent to the jungle for their photoshoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 3 recreate some of Elle's most famous poses and there is a shock at elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The winner of Britain's Next Top Model is decided in the first ever live final of the series.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges begin their search by holding auditions in Glasgow and London

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed continue their UK tour, in Cardiff and Birmingham. They audition more girls hoping to make it in the world of modelling.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed judge the final round of auditions, giving hopefuls one last chance to secure a place at the boot camp

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls who have made it through the audition stage battle it out in boot camp. Twelve girls will be chosen to move into the house and the next stage of the competition.

programme.title: Dare, Dream, Dominate.: The Beginning
programme.desc: Begyndelsen. Mark O Madsen er stoppet som fighter – men kampen er langt fra slut. Sammen med Maria sætter han alt på spil i forsøget på at skabe Danmarks største MMA-show. Næsten allerede fra første skridt er udfordringerne overvældende.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and the guys visit Lowell at his new bachelor pad and start using it to get away from their home lives; Andi keeps pushing Adam for her own desk at the office.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam catches Kate sneaking back into the house at night, he is determined to fix the behavior with old-school parenting tactics; Andi is dismayed when she can't find many baby pictures of Emme.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi go to great lengths to secure a loan to fix an unexpected issue on their flip house.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed; Kate is allowed to stay home alone but doesn't follow Adam and Andi's strict rules.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam offers to go on a vegan diet with Kate in an effort to bond with her, his love of meat proves a hard habit to break.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: After Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, he is still determined to take a dirt bike excursion and check it off his bucket list; Don and Adam give out bonuses at work.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam accidentally invites Andi to go on the guys' annual trip, he tries to un-invite her, which only makes matters worse.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's snooty sister in her place when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi see how much Lowell's new relationship with Andi's sister is changing him, they stage an intervention to get him to stop putting up with her bad behavior.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's doctor advises her to stop taking birth control pills, Adam and Andi disagree on an alternate option.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Dave has a cold that has him acting like a baby, and Debbie's treating him like one; Rebecca and Joanna, however, think he's overreacting and are concerned he's going to ruin their spa weekend away

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don become super protective of Lowell when they think he might get back together with his cheating ex-wife; Joe experiences an unexpected side effect from his new pacemaker.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi offer Teddy dating advice but wind up making things super awkward for him instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam encourages Don to give himself food poisoning to get out of babysitting his destructive grandson; Adam and Andi argue over who has to take Kate and her teenage friends dress shopping.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam buys a boat without asking Andi, they wind up in couples therapy to settle the disagreement.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam discovers someone is sneaking his boat out at night, and he assumes the culprits are Don and Joe; after Andi makes Kate get a job at the mall, Kate decides she no longer wants to go to college.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don disagree about a new house to flip for their construction business, their bickering reveals bigger issues in their relationship; Andi goes to great lengths to throw the perfect birthday party for Bev.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam's mother-in-law Alice makes an unexpected visit and reveals some shocking news.
programme.sub-title: Stuck In The Middle With You

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi resort to their usual punishment in response to Teddy's bad grades, his unexpected reaction catches them off guard.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi attempt to spice up their social life by making new friends.
programme.sub-title: Adam and Andi See Other People

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam has trouble helping Katie prepare for her driving test; Don turns to Lowell for help romancing Marcy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam tries to give Andi the perfect 20th wedding anniversary gift by re-creating their honeymoon.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Cooking show celebrity Hisama Hirano is invited to Kitchen Stadium to go head-to-head with Iron Chef Chen.
programme.sub-title: Sea Urchin: Battle to the Death

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: One of the fastest-rising chefs from Kyoto, the ancient capital of Japan, Chef Kenji Kaji is invited to battle with Iron Chef Michiba at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Tonight's battle is a fierce tag-team event between the Cuomo brothers and Iron Chefs Sakai and Michiba. Who will come out as the champions in the Italian-inspired dual?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Female chef Yoshiko Takemasa is so fastidious that she only cooks fish caught by rods, not nets, to ensure no bruising.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Joel Bruant, an apprentice of the emperor of French cuisine, Paul Bocuse, hopes to once again defeat Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Minoru Noda has traveled all the way from Los Angeles to challenge Iron Chef Michiba in an ultimate Japanese battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga brings in Philippe Aubron, a French chef from Provence, to challenge Iron Chef Sakai in a heated crayfish battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Tsuguo Fujiwara, the managing director of the Chinese Chef's Association, takes on Iron Chef Chen in a battle of sea cucumber.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Sadaharu Nakajima takes on Iron Chef Sakai in a sticky battle of rice. Will Nakajima's rice salad with smoked salmon and melon win over Sakai's roast abalone and rice?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's a night of tiebreakers when Japanese television star Kumbi Lin challenges Iron Chef Michiba. Who will reign supreme in this doubleheader? Part 1.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's a night of tiebreakers when Japanese television star Kumbi Lin challenges Iron Chef Michiba. Who will reign supreme in this doubleheader? Part 2.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Witness as Masahiko Hagiwara takes on Iron Chef Chen in this battle of shrimp. Will Chen be able to beat Hagiwara? Tune in to find out!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Top chef Ikegawa Kiyotaka, who used to be a sumo wrestler, challenges Iron Chef Chen to a culinary battle that outperforms any sumo wrestling match you've ever seen!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Celebrating the 100th challenger at Kitchen Stadium, Chairman Kaga has chosen Challenger Toshiro Kandagawa who takes on Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Bruno Menard is well-known for his 'sharp' dishes. Will he able to win this battle of escargot with Iron Chef Sakai?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen must fend off his own best friend as a challenger. Shozo Miyamoto serves up a Szechuan and Shanghai-cuisine battle to his old friend.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: From Arima Onsen comes the vice president of Japan Chef's Association, Challenger Tadamichi Ota. Will Iron Chef Sakai be able to capture a victory in this battle of octopus?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The head chef of the two-star restaurant L'Amphycles, Philippe Groult is determined to defeat Iron Chef Sakai in this oyster onslaught.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga pits two of his Iron Chefs against each other for the annual Mr. Iron Chef Tournament. Chen and Sakai go head-to-head for the chance to challenge the defending champion.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The heated battle between Chen and Sakai reveals Chen as the winner, who now has to go against the reigning Mr. Iron Chef, Michiba.

programme.title: Snooker
programme.desc: Professional players compete against each other during a prominent snooker championship in a bid to emerge victorious and win the prestigious title.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 er den nye hurtige og spennende versjonen av spillet! Kom og se ukentlige konkurranser, arkiv spill, studio segmenter og mye mer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan steps in when a heart condition sidelines a promising basketball player's dreams.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are on hand when a dying woman attempts a reconciliation with her estranged father. She is a single mother who wants her family to take the child.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Scotty is a lovelorn quadriplegic with a successful law practice. Jonathan is happy to play cupid, but Mark isn't so thrilled about it, because the woman in question is his cousin.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A greedy banker and a good-hearted bum switch places. The bum dies, but the banker is now infused with love and generosity.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark meet a child star whose fame is spoiling her rotten, destroying her family and taking away her childhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan encourages residents in a neighborhood to unite against a cold-hearted developer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan inspires a young man to help the grandfather who has recently been placed in a nursing home.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Lizzy MacGill is a horse trainer's young daughter who elopes with Garth Armstrong, a privileged man.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help Lizzie. The new bride has cancer and she is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark and Jonathan become counselors at a camp for children with cancer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are helping patients at Camp Good Times in different ways. But a father still refuses to deal with his son's illness.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan relinquishes his angelic powers for awhile and realizes the dangers that Mark has faced being a police officer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An aspiring actress wants to be accepted for who she really is, not in the image her well-meaning dad tries to transform her into.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark has been tricked into selling his soul in order to save a little girl's life. But the Devil has another agenda: acquiring Jonathan's soul.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Factory workers ignore ground-water contamination, even though it is making their children sick. As a result, Jonathan takes drastic measures to force them to face the facts.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A minor-league baseball team never wins, so Jonathan and Mark set out to help them. They also come to the aid of an elderly vendor who has been kicked out of the stadium.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The lead actor in a Broadway play claims that God is attending the show's performances, sitting in a third-row orchestra seat.
programme.sub-title: The Smile in the Third Row

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Vultures
programme.desc: Two bounty hunters arrive in the Dodge City area looking for a wanted man. They shoot him for a $1000 reward. Earp agrees to get their money but wants them out of town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Plagued by gold thefts, Denver bankers set up their own mint in the bank basement.
programme.sub-title: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Unable to come to terms, a U.S. senator and a Supreme Court justice agree to a duel.
programme.sub-title: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Wells Fargo stage driver Charlie Parkhurst wins fame for his daring endeavors.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: In part two, A young outlaw is reformed by the kindness and help of an elderly female junk collector.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Jeb Slade talks his brother Billy into helping him rob Aaron Winters, who is wealthy from his borax findings.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Buff McCloud runs a Nevada town with an iron fist — until a stranger arrives.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt's Decision
programme.desc: Earp decides to leave Tombstone but learns the Clantons are gunning for him. Nellie Cashman and Dick Gird want Earp to stay to bring law and order to Tombstone.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An embittered ranch woman holds Matt Dillon and Kitty prisoner while plotting Matt's execution to avenge her husband's hanging.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Just Before the Battle
programme.desc: A stagecoach holdup orchestrated by Johnny Ringo and Curly Bill gives Wyatt Earp the opportunity he's been waiting for--a chance to get the rival factions to turn on each other.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hunt the Man Down
programme.desc: Earp is forced with the help of Mr. Cousin to go into the rough Bushwhacker area to track down a man wanted for murder.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: One-Man Army
programme.desc: Texan Drum Denman goes after northerner Earp by backing a free newspaper to print false stories about Earp trying to draw him out of Dodge City.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Lt. Robert Benson becomes torn when the woman he loves asks him to give out secret government information.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Good Man
programme.desc: A reformed gambler Tittle comes to Dodge City preaching against gambling and the devil. Earp is forced to intervene when Tittle preaches in a popular saloon.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: On one drunken evening, a miner gives a pretty saloon singer half-interest in his apparently worthless claim.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Time for All Good Men
programme.desc: The owner of the Big T Rance Purcell and his foreman Gus Andrews trap Earp alone at Stony Wells. Earp outnumbered 30 to 1 is running out of water and ammo.
programme.sub-title: The Time for All Good Men

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A crafty rancher tries to frame his wife with a hired hand in a plot to force money from her father.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Two bronco busters risk their lives to raise money for a ranch in Montana, only to have the dream ruined by a wild stallion.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A man seeking to open a saloon turns to Harry Bassett, Wyatt Earp and Bat Masterson for help.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Suspicious townspeople are drawn toward two brothers who spend their nights digging at a grave.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Bat Masterson Again
programme.desc: Earp learns Masterson has dropped out of school and is a scout for the Army.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Lawyer William Thorne defends an innocent woman threatened by bigotry and mob violence in an Arizona town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When her cow is killed by a train, Lucy Tutaine is outraged by the indifference to her financial loss.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The story of Amadeo Giannini and the creation of the Bank of America.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A rancher who has been threatened refuses Matt's help.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Mr. Buntline's Vacation
programme.desc: Ned Buntline arrives in Dodge City broke looking for help from Earp who is happy to help in return for the Buntline special.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John II
programme.desc: I kveldens episode av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John nifse haier i 'Finneskrekk', vil ikke investere i folk som er 'Ikke banebrytende' og finner ut hva som skjer når man tar 'Slurvete snarveier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John III
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John pengerådgivning av 'Mini-Daymonds', møter noen rasende bier som skaper 'Biebataljer' og tester produkter i 'Prøv før du kjøper'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood rådløse på sjøen og blir helt 'Havkorka', kaster for mange erteposer i 'Villvest-Cornhole' og må jobbe med egen tålmodighet fordi de 'Avskyr å vente'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' klatrer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz i feil trær med 'Døde greiner', klatrer opp på feil person i 'Dårlige skulderholdere' og blir intense på kontoret med 'Ekstrem kontorstoling'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Paige Desorbo se noen ryggradpirrende fall i 'Ryggknekkere', hører hvordan Rob sparte penger for å flytte til California i 'Lagerleker' og avslutter med smerte ved vannet i 'Tørr landing'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' vil Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Paige DeSorbo unngå å få nesen ut av ledd i 'Neseborsjokk', unngår små, gira råtasser i 'Helvete på plasthjul' og kliner til med noen frampå eldre damer i 'Sugne bestemødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood sparkesykkel-kollisjoner til et høyere nivå med 'Sparkesykkelspark', konfronterer søppeldagen direkte med 'Vanskelig søppel' og snur uhell til hell i 'Utilsiktede seiere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut håret med 'Partyrotter', ler av noen ordentlige 'Krimklovner' og tar en titt på ulike 'Krasjkamera'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood X
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å bære alt i én omgang i 'For mye å bære', slår seg løs på do med 'Båskriminalitet' og er ekstremt galante som i 'De beste kjærestene'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis farene ved stiger i 'Stigekræsj', føler at de må følge fulle venner hjem i 'Fylleleveranser' og oppdager at ikke alle maskoter er like i 'Maskotproblemer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood verdens verste smerter i 'Halebeinbrutalitet', opplever at allergisesongen er ille i 'Naturlig snørrete' og drar langt ut på landet og fester i 'Partylåver'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis mellom snøbrettkjørere og skiløpere i 'Snøkrig', slåss mot sulten på verste måte i 'Nattmatkatastrofe' og sykler på feil trær i 'Sykkel møter bark'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kaster Rob, Steelo og Lexi Rivera seg inn i spillet med noen 'Nattatleter', tar en slumsete drink laget av noen 'Sleivete miksologer' og feirer irriterende forhold i 'Elsker å hate dem'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' benytter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lexi Rivera de bevegelige trappene i 'Opptrappet smerte', møter morderiske barn som muligens er 'Foreldrekverkere' og kan ikke krysse gaten uten å oppleve 'Overgangskræsj'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' fyrer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av noen 'Skliskudd', starter hårete branner 'I fyr og flamme' og krangler om rot i 'Snuskete kjærlighet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood tak i en partner og nyter 'Parskøyting', gjør seg klar til en underholdende kveld i 'Brettspillmiserer' og opplever hvor tøft det er å dele rom med 'Pottesure papegøyer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvilken terrengbåt de helst velger i 'Landjakk', ser på alle måtene barn kan sette seg fast i 'Smårollingfeller' og avslutter med distre folk som er 'Uten romforståelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood i gang kjøretøyene sine i 'Flyktende motorer', vender det andre kinnet til i 'Overraskelseskyss' og hogger i vei med litt 'Økseanarki'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av sangeren Teddy Swims og ser nærmere på folk som 'Mister kontrollen', får faderlige råd i 'Pappavisdom og kaster ut noen problemtyper i 'Vis dem veien ut'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood problemer med å sette seg på grunn av 'Stolnasking', møter brått uventede dyr i 'Dyrestøkk' og bruker god tid på å falle i 'Gradvise fall'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood nærbilkontakt med leppene i 'Bilkyssere', får seg et slag under beltestedet med 'Lavtslåtte damer' og orker ikke å spise når de er sammen med 'Matlystslukkere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at telefoner kan være distraherende i 'Telefonblind', møter unger som bør finne seg en annen sportsgren i 'Minigolfere' og besøker noen steder der det er 'Kjempekaldt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med stil idet de 'Flyr over styret', spaserer på løs grunn i 'Fallgulv' og drar for å gjøre innkjøp altfor sent i 'Grubutikken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter å ha falt i koma under en etterforskning, finner Allisons ånd veien inn i kroppen til en mann ved navn Todd Emory.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison henvender seg til Cynthia Keener (som nå er i fengsel) når hun begynner å drømme om et tidligere kidnappingsoffer som Cynthia en gang reddet.
programme.sub-title: The First Bite Is the Deepest

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Mens Allison takler Joes jobbflytting til San Diego, drømmer hun om og møter deretter en bankansatt ved navn Mrs. Boddicker som forutså et ran i banken hennes.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når aspekter av Allisons drøm om å miste hele familien begynner å skje i virkeligheten, frykter hun at drømmen hennes kan gå i oppfyllelse.
programme.sub-title: Bring Me the Head of Oswaldo Castillo

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison og familien hennes må håndtere resultatene av hjerneoperasjonen hennes. Eieren av en lokal TV-stasjon ber også Devalos og Scanlon om å undersøke om sportsankeret hans blir forfulgt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bekymret etter at Ariel begynner å vise merkelig oppførsel, og begynner å tenke at en myrdet stripper kan besitte henne.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Allisons kreftrammede venn dør uventet, mistenker hun at en sykehusansatt kan ha skylden. Bridgette skriver en historie veldig nær det som senere skjer på Joes jobbintervju.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir forvirret når hun begynner å se visjoner om merkelige symboler. Når en seriemorder slår Phoenix, oppdager hun at symbolene kan være ledetråder for å fange morderen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Et spedbarn blir kidnappet fra Allisons nabolag, og hun blir så fast bestemt på å finne barnet at Joe frykter at hun kan ha blitt besatt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons mareritt utspiller seg i scener fra den klassiske filmen Night of the Living Dead, og får henne til å våkne opp med merkelige sår, men også med ledetråder i saken om et drap på en begravelsesagent.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison leier en SUV etter at bilen hennes er skadet, og hun oppdager at SUVens satellittradio lar henne lytte til andres samtaler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Ariel begynner å date en gutt fra skolen, har Allison visjoner som indikerer at han kan være involvert i et lokalt mord.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter på merkelig vis å ha blitt følsom for lys, bruker Allison et par solbriller som viser merkelige tall som kan være relatert til folks forventede levealder.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons visjoner blir en viktig informasjonskilde for myndighetene når prøvene av en dødelig sykdom forsvinner. I mellomtiden tror Scanlon at han er klar til å fri til Lynn.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Hovedmistenkte i en drapssak dør, og politiet er overbevist om at han var skyldig. Men når den døde mannen kontakter Allison, sier han at han er uskyldig og at han vil hjelpe henne med å finne morderen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når årsdagen for Devalos' datters død nærmer seg, blir Devalos hjemsøkt av minnene fra den traumatiske hendelsen, og Allison drømmer om hvor langt Devalos gikk for å sette datterens morder i fengsel.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om et schizofrent barn, men når hun møter henne i det virkelige liv, virker hun helt normal - men hun har en psykisk syk romkamerat.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison ser hele tiden ansiktet til en mann i ansiktene til andre mennesker, inkludert Joe, og må finne ut hvorfor. I mellomtiden har Ariel problemer med å sitte barnevakt for en rampete gutt.
programme.sub-title: Will the Real Fred Rovick Please Stand Up?

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison melder seg på selvforsvarskurs. I mellomtiden jobber Devalos med en tenårings voldtektssak, i tillegg til å undersøke et mistenkt mord som involverer en politimann.
programme.sub-title: How to Beat a Bad Guy

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Vi ser tilbake på Allison og Joes bryllup, og hvordan den økende styrken til Allisons "krefter" påvirket det snart gifte paret.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Michaela returns to Boston to visit her ailing mother, Sully must act before he loses her.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A severe drought threatens -- and divides -- Colorado Springs at Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike suspects that Dorothy is spending time with Sully, and Becky thinks Colleen stole her boyfriend.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The children hide a wounded Sully from the cavalry, which has put a bounty on his head.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike sees Christmas past, present and future with the help of a beloved friend.
programme.sub-title: A Christmas Tale - Dr. Mike's Dream

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Matthew is trapped in a mine cave and Sully is his only hope for rescue.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A typhus epidemic spreads at Black Kettle's camp, and Dr. Mike feels responsible.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The Circus comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Another woman comes between Sully and Dr. Mike.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Dr. Mike helps the reverend find parents for orphaned children, he gets ideas about marrying her.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully and Dr. Mike take desperate action as the battle between the Buffalo Soldiers and The Dog Soldiers escalates.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Matthew becomes addicted to gambling.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy's charming son, a war hero, comes home with a war injury and a shameful secret -- a drug addiction.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A Denver banker returns to town and brings the Ku Klux Klan with him.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The new school teacher may be guilty of child abuse.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela is kidnapped by the dog soldiers, and Sully vows to find her before she is killed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela is kidnapped by the dog soldiers, and Sully vows to find her before she is killed.

programme.title: Dynasty: Two Flights To Haiti
programme.desc: Selv om Blake ber henne om å vente med å gjøre noe før Jeffs voldelige oppførsel kan forklares, flyr Fallon til Haiti for å skille seg. Mark dukker uventet opp på hotellet hennes.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Mirror
programme.desc: Alexis er bekymret for at legene skal finne ut sannheten om Jeffs sykdom, men Adam prøver å dekke over ved å få kontoret pusset opp og fjerne den livsfarlige malingen.

programme.title: Dynasty: Battle Lines
programme.desc: Krystle mistenker at Alexis vet årsaken til Jeffs sykdom. Blake prøver å forhindre Alexis' foreslåtte sammenslåing. Jeff blir utskrevet fra sykehuset, og Kirby avslører sine følelser for ham.

programme.title: Reunion in Singapore
programme.desc: Blake reiser til Singapore for å identifisere sønnen, og Alexis dukker opp på flyplassen for å forsikre ham om at hun ikke vil la seg stanse i å fusjonere selskapene deres.

programme.title: Dynasty: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: Blake overtaler Steven til å returnere til Denver for sønnens skyld. Nyheten om at Steven lever og kommer hjem setter følelsene i sving hos Carrington-familien.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Downstairs Bride
programme.desc: Da han får høre at Kirby har giftet seg med Jeff, forteller Joseph datteren at hun har ødelagt livet sitt. Blake foreslår at han og Alexis skal inngå våpenvile i kampen om Steven.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Vote
programme.desc: Da styret samles for å stemme over fusjonen mellom Denver-Carrington og Colbyco, kunngjør Alexis at de som stemmer nei får sparken omgående.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Dinner
programme.desc: Blake konfronterer Alexis med bevis på falske tall som ble brukt i den nylige fusjonen. Alexis finner ut at Blakes lukrative oljeutvinningsprosess ikke omfatter Colbyco.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Threat
programme.desc: En skandaløs avisoverskrift kobler kongressmedlemmet McVane til en ung jente i Washington. Han innser at Alexis står bak. Kirby finner ut at hun er gravid.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Cabin
programme.desc: Når Blake får vite at Stevens advokat, Chris, har flyttet sammen med sønnen, sverger han på kjempe for omsorgen for lille Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Arrest
programme.desc: Krystle og Alexis, som er innesperret en brennende hytte langt uti skogen, finner ut at døren er låst – fra utsiden. Mark redder de to kvinnene på dramatisk vis.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Bungalow
programme.desc: Mark blir siktet for drap og brannstiftelse. Alexis forteller Blake og politiet at han ville hevne seg. De andre mistenkte i saken, McVane, Hess og Adam, blir avhørt og løslatt.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Note
programme.desc: Alexis får en beskjed fra avdøde Joseph – han startet brannen for å drepe henne. Claudia slipper ut fra sanatoriet. Steven og Blake slåss om lille Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing - Part 1
programme.desc: Kirby angriper Alexis og krever å vite hvorfor Joseph ville drepe henne. I rettsaken om foreldreretten til Danny, vitner Alexis mot Blake, som blir rasende.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing - Part 2
programme.desc: Rettssaken om foreldreretten fortsetter, og Fallon vitner på vegne av broren sin, mens Sammy Jo fornærmer eksmannen. Fallon drar til Montana for å grave i Adams fortid. Alexis' leilighet blir endevendt.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tender Comrades
programme.desc: Steven og Claudia gifter seg, og dommeren henlegger saken om foreldreretten. Blake tilbyr Krystle en PR-jobb. Adam lurer Alexis til å signere blanke dokumenter.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tracy
programme.desc: Adam fabrikerer en falsk anklage om at Alexis sto bak forgiftningen, og Blake truer med å offentliggjøre historien. Mark angriper Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty: Dex
programme.desc: Jeff anklager Alexis for å forsøke å drepe ham og tar tilbake aksjene sine. Mark blir bodyguard for Alexis. Dex Dexter, sønnen til et styremedlem, foreslår at han og Alexis danner en forretningsforbindelse.
